prerequisites.zh: 已确认输入最终进入 Unix/POSIX 类 Shell，而不是直接作为 argv 传给固定程序。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that input reaches a Unix or POSIX-like shell rather than being passed directly as argv to a fixed program.

prerequisites.zh: 具备可关联请求 ID 的子进程审计，并可使用只输出随机标记的无害命令。
prerequisites.en: Have child-process auditing correlated by request ID and a harmless command that emits only a random marker.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是分隔符后的第二条标记命令由目标进程派生，且同结构阴性请求不执行。输入被页面回显、网关把换行拆成两个请求、或日志出现分号都属于假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is a second marker command spawned by the target after the separator while a structurally identical negative case does not execute. Reflection, a gateway splitting newlines into requests, or separators merely appearing in logs are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 首次观察到独立标记子进程后立即停止，不继续尝试文件读取、网络连接或持久化命令。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately after observing the first independent marker process; do not proceed to file reads, network callbacks, or persistence.

opsecTips.zh: 结束后删除标记文件、清除测试队列并核对没有残留子进程或异常 Shell 会话。
opsecTips.en: After testing, delete marker files, clear queued cases, and verify that no child process or unexpected shell session remains.

name.zh: Shell 命令分隔符边界

description.zh: 使用管道、逻辑运算符、分号和编码换行探测输入是否被操作系统 Shell 当作控制符解析。
description.en: Uses pipes, logical operators, semicolons, and encoded newlines to test whether input is parsed as shell control syntax.

overview.zh: Shell 命令分隔符边界用于覆盖 Unix Shell 常见命令连接符及 CR/LF 编码，目标是确认解释器边界而非直接执行高影响命令。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: Shell Command-Separator Boundary is intended for this boundary: Covers common Unix shell connectors and CR/LF encodings to identify an interpreter boundary without high-impact commands. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 应用将输入拼入 shell 字符串或以 shell=true 调用子进程，控制字符因此从数据升级为语法。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: The application concatenates input into a shell string or invokes a child process with shell parsing, turning control characters from data into syntax. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 先用普通字母建立基线，再逐个加入分隔符并在后方放置只产生固定标记的无害命令。 必须在子进程审计或响应中看到第二命令的固定标记，并排除输入回显、网关换行拆分与应用日志拼接。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Start with an alphanumeric baseline, then add one separator at a time followed by a harmless command that emits a fixed marker. The fixed marker from the second command must appear in child-process audit or output after excluding reflection, gateway line splitting, and log concatenation. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 使用参数数组直接调用目标程序，禁止 shell 解释；对参数执行类型和允许列表校验并拒绝控制字符。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Invoke the intended program with an argument array and no shell, validate types and allowlists, and reject control characters. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认Shell 分隔符探测适用边界
title.en: Confirm the Shell Separator Probing boundary

description.zh: 覆盖 Unix Shell 常见命令连接符及 CR/LF 编码，目标是确认解释器边界而非直接执行高影响命令。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: Covers common Unix shell connectors and CR/LF encodings to identify an interpreter boundary without high-impact commands. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控Shell 分隔符探测样例
title.en: Submit a controlled Shell Separator Probing case

description.zh: 先用普通字母建立基线，再逐个加入分隔符并在后方放置只产生固定标记的无害命令。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: Start with an alphanumeric baseline, then add one separator at a time followed by a harmless command that emits a fixed marker. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

title.zh: 核对Shell 分隔符探测证据
title.en: Verify Shell Separator Probing evidence

description.zh: 必须在子进程审计或响应中看到第二命令的固定标记，并排除输入回显、网关换行拆分与应用日志拼接。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: The fixed marker from the second command must appear in child-process audit or output after excluding reflection, gateway line splitting, and log concatenation. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归Shell 分隔符探测
title.en: Remediate and regress Shell Separator Probing

description.zh: 使用参数数组直接调用目标程序，禁止 shell 解释；对参数执行类型和允许列表校验并拒绝控制字符。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Invoke the intended program with an argument array and no shell, validate types and allowlists, and reject control characters. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: 纯分隔符是命令注入入口探针，不是系统命令手册。

prerequisites.zh: 目标解释器支持参数展开与字段分割，并已记录实际 IFS 值及是否被应用重写。
prerequisites.en: The target interpreter supports parameter expansion and field splitting, and the effective IFS value and application overrides are recorded.

prerequisites.zh: 准备一个无敏感内容的测试文件或 echo 标记，用于区分一个字符串与两个 argv 参数。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a nonsensitive test file or echo marker that distinguishes one string from two argv arguments.

analysis.zh: 只有进程 argv、xtrace 或等价审计显示 $IFS 展开成独立参数并触发预期无害动作才为阳性。过滤器放行 `$IFS`、Shell 打印变量文本、或未定义变量导致空串均不能单独证明绕过。
analysis.en: A finding requires argv, xtrace, or equivalent audit showing IFS expansion into separate arguments and the intended harmless action. A filter allowing `$IFS`, the shell printing it literally, or an undefined variable becoming empty does not prove bypass.

opsecTips.zh: 一旦确认字段分割形成预期两个参数即停止，禁止继续读取 `/flag` 或遍历根目录样例。
opsecTips.en: Stop as soon as field splitting into the expected two arguments is confirmed; do not continue with `/flag` reads or root-directory listing samples.

opsecTips.zh: 测试完成后恢复环境变量基线，删除临时标记并确认 Shell 环境未被持久修改。
opsecTips.en: Restore the environment-variable baseline after testing, remove temporary markers, and verify that the shell environment was not persistently modified.

name.zh: Shell IFS 空白替代注入

description.zh: 利用 $IFS 及参数扩展替代空格，验证过滤器与 Shell 对参数边界的解释差异。
description.en: Uses $IFS and parameter expansion as whitespace substitutes to test parser differences between filters and the shell.

overview.zh: Shell IFS 空白替代注入用于条目包含 whoami、cat、ls 等命令的 IFS 变体，只有在 POSIX/Bash 类 Shell 展开环境变量时才适用。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: Shell IFS Whitespace-Substitution Injection is intended for this boundary: Contains IFS variants of commands such as whoami, cat, and ls and applies only when a POSIX-like or Bash shell expands variables. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 应用依赖空格黑名单但仍将输入交给 Shell，IFS 展开在过滤后重新产生字段分隔，恢复命令和参数边界。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: The application blocks spaces but still delegates to a shell, where IFS expansion recreates field separators after filtering. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 确认实际 Shell 和 IFS 值，使用一个固定标记文件或 echo 参数比较普通空格、$IFS 与未定义变量三组请求。 进程 argv 或 Shell 执行跟踪必须显示 IFS 展开后形成了独立参数；原字符串被接受或页面报错不构成绕过。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Confirm the shell and IFS value, then compare ordinary space, $IFS, and an undefined-variable control using a fixed marker file or echo argument. Process argv or shell tracing must show separate arguments after IFS expansion; accepting the raw string or returning an error is not bypass. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 移除 Shell 调用并传递结构化 argv；若无法移除，固定环境、清空不需要变量并对每个参数做允许列表验证。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Remove shell invocation and pass structured argv; if unavoidable, fix the environment, clear unneeded variables, and allowlist each argument. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认IFS 参数边界绕过适用边界
title.en: Confirm the IFS Argument-Boundary Bypass boundary

description.zh: 条目包含 whoami、cat、ls 等命令的 IFS 变体，只有在 POSIX/Bash 类 Shell 展开环境变量时才适用。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: Contains IFS variants of commands such as whoami, cat, and ls and applies only when a POSIX-like or Bash shell expands variables. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控IFS 参数边界绕过样例
title.en: Submit a controlled IFS Argument-Boundary Bypass case

description.zh: 确认实际 Shell 和 IFS 值，使用一个固定标记文件或 echo 参数比较普通空格、$IFS 与未定义变量三组请求。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: Confirm the shell and IFS value, then compare ordinary space, $IFS, and an undefined-variable control using a fixed marker file or echo argument. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

attackChain.payload:
whoami
who$IFSami
wh$oa$mi
w$h$o$a$m$i
who${IFS}ami
who${IFS:- }ami
who$IFS$IFSami
cat$IFS/flag
cat${IFS}/flag
cat${IFS:- }/flag
cat$IFS$IFS/flag
ls$IFS/
ls${IFS}/
ls${IFS:- }/
id$IFS
id${IFS}
id${IFS:- }
uname$IFS-a
uname${IFS}-a
uname${IFS:- }-a
pwd$IFS
pwd${IFS}
pwd${IFS:- }
hostname$IFS
hostname${IFS}
hostname${IFS:- }

title.zh: 核对IFS 参数边界绕过证据
title.en: Verify IFS Argument-Boundary Bypass evidence

description.zh: 进程 argv 或 Shell 执行跟踪必须显示 IFS 展开后形成了独立参数；原字符串被接受或页面报错不构成绕过。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: Process argv or shell tracing must show separate arguments after IFS expansion; accepting the raw string or returning an error is not bypass. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归IFS 参数边界绕过
title.en: Remediate and regress IFS Argument-Boundary Bypass

description.zh: 移除 Shell 调用并传递结构化 argv；若无法移除，固定环境、清空不需要变量并对每个参数做允许列表验证。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Remove shell invocation and pass structured argv; if unavoidable, fix the environment, clear unneeded variables, and allowlist each argument. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: IFS 变体改变命令参数解析，属于命令注入 Payload。

prerequisites.zh: 已识别目标为会连接相邻引用片段的 Unix Shell，并排除 Windows CMD、PowerShell 和直接 exec 调用。
prerequisites.en: Identify a Unix shell that concatenates adjacent quoted fragments and exclude Windows CMD, PowerShell, and direct exec invocation.

prerequisites.zh: 在隔离目录提供唯一的无害测试可执行文件，避免引用重组后命中真实系统命令。
prerequisites.en: Provide a unique harmless test executable in an isolated directory so quote reassembly cannot invoke a real system command.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求引号片段在 Shell 词法阶段重组为同一个测试命令名，并在进程映像中可见。未闭合引号错误、过滤规则不告警、或字符串在响应中去掉引号都是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires quoted fragments to reassemble into one test command token visible in the process image. Unclosed-quote errors, a silent filter, or quotes disappearing only in reflected output are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 测试命令被成功重组一次后停止，不切换到 `cat`、`uname` 等会暴露主机信息的原始行。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one successful test-command reassembly and do not switch to original `cat` or `uname` lines that expose host data.

opsecTips.zh: 移除隔离目录中的测试可执行文件和 PATH 临时变更，并复核没有名称碰撞残留。
opsecTips.en: Remove the test executable and any temporary PATH changes, then verify that no command-name collision remains.

name.zh: Shell 引号令牌拆分注入

description.zh: 在命令名中插入单引号或双引号，验证 Shell 拼接令牌与关键词过滤器之间的语义差异。
description.en: Inserts single or double quotes into command names to test semantic differences between shell token concatenation and keyword filters.

overview.zh: Shell 引号令牌拆分注入用于这些变体依赖 Shell 将相邻引用片段连接为同一单词，不适用于直接 execve 参数或 Windows CMD。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: Shell Quote-Based Token Fragmentation is intended for this boundary: These variants rely on a shell concatenating adjacent quoted fragments into one word and do not apply to direct execve arguments or Windows CMD. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 过滤器按原始文本匹配完整命令名，而 Shell 删除引用语法后重组令牌，导致被拆开的关键词恢复。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: A filter matches complete command names in raw text while the shell removes quote syntax and reassembles the token, restoring the blocked word. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 先确认输入经过哪种 Shell，再用无害自定义命令名或固定 echo 标记比较完整单词、引号拆分和未闭合引号。 Shell 跟踪或进程映像必须显示拆分文本被重组为同一可执行文件；语法错误变化或 WAF 放行不算成功。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Identify the shell, then compare a complete harmless command name, a quote-fragmented form, and an unclosed-quote control using a fixed echo marker. Shell tracing or the process image must show fragmented text reassembled into the same executable; changed syntax errors or WAF passage are insufficient. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 禁止拼接 Shell 命令，使用固定可执行文件和 argv；不要以关键词黑名单或引号删除代替结构化调用。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Do not concatenate shell commands; use a fixed executable and argv, and never substitute keyword blacklists or quote removal for structured invocation. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认引号令牌重组适用边界
title.en: Confirm the Quote-Based Token Reassembly boundary

description.zh: 这些变体依赖 Shell 将相邻引用片段连接为同一单词，不适用于直接 execve 参数或 Windows CMD。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: These variants rely on a shell concatenating adjacent quoted fragments into one word and do not apply to direct execve arguments or Windows CMD. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控引号令牌重组样例
title.en: Submit a controlled Quote-Based Token Reassembly case

description.zh: 先确认输入经过哪种 Shell，再用无害自定义命令名或固定 echo 标记比较完整单词、引号拆分和未闭合引号。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: Identify the shell, then compare a complete harmless command name, a quote-fragmented form, and an unclosed-quote control using a fixed echo marker. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

attackChain.payload:
w'h'o'am'i
w"h"o"am"i
w'h'o'a'm'i
w"h"o"a"m"i
c'a't /flag
c"a"t /flag
c'a't$IFS/flag
c"a"t$IFS/flag
c'a't${IFS}/flag
c"a"t${IFS}/flag
l's' /
l"s" /
i'd'
i"d"
u'n'a'm'e -a
u"n"a"m"e -a
p'w'd
p"w"d
h'o's't'n'a'm'e
h"o"s"t"n"a"m"e

title.zh: 核对引号令牌重组证据
title.en: Verify Quote-Based Token Reassembly evidence

description.zh: Shell 跟踪或进程映像必须显示拆分文本被重组为同一可执行文件；语法错误变化或 WAF 放行不算成功。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: Shell tracing or the process image must show fragmented text reassembled into the same executable; changed syntax errors or WAF passage are insufficient. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归引号令牌重组
title.en: Remediate and regress Quote-Based Token Reassembly

description.zh: 禁止拼接 Shell 命令，使用固定可执行文件和 argv；不要以关键词黑名单或引号删除代替结构化调用。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Do not concatenate shell commands; use a fixed executable and argv, and never substitute keyword blacklists or quote removal for structured invocation. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: 引号拆分是 Shell 解析层注入变体，保留为 Payload。

prerequisites.zh: 目标 Shell 同时支持 printf 十六进制转义与 `$()` 或反引号命令替换。
prerequisites.en: The target shell supports both printf hexadecimal escapes and command substitution through `$()` or backticks.

prerequisites.zh: 已将编码正文替换为仅输出唯一令牌的命令，并启用能观察解码器与第二阶段进程的审计。
prerequisites.en: Replace encoded content with a command that emits only a unique token and enable auditing of both decoder and second-stage processes.

analysis.zh: 阳性链应依次出现 printf 解码和解码结果对应的标记进程；仅看到十六进制转为明文、命令替换返回空值、或应用回显明文都不代表执行。
analysis.en: A positive chain shows printf decoding followed by the marker process represented by the decoded text. Hexadecimal text becoming plaintext, command substitution returning empty output, or application reflection does not demonstrate execution.

opsecTips.zh: 确认一次二阶段标记执行后立即停止，禁止解码原集合中的文件读取或主机枚举命令。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately after one second-stage marker execution; do not decode the source file-read or host-enumeration commands.

opsecTips.zh: 删除标记产物与 Shell 历史中的测试字符串，确认没有反引号子进程或临时脚本残留。
opsecTips.en: Delete marker artifacts and test strings from shell history, and confirm that no backtick child process or temporary script remains.

name.zh: printf 十六进制命令替换注入

description.zh: 通过 printf 解码十六进制字节，再由 $() 或反引号执行结果，验证编码内容能否跨越命令边界。
description.en: Decodes hexadecimal bytes with printf and executes the result through $() or backticks to test whether encoded content crosses the command boundary.

subCategory.zh: 十六进制解码与命令替换

overview.zh: printf 十六进制命令替换注入用于集合同时覆盖单引号、双引号及两种命令替换语法，适用于支持 printf 转义与命令替换的 Unix Shell。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: printf Hex-Decoding Command Substitution is intended for this boundary: Covers single and double quotes plus two command-substitution forms in Unix shells that support printf escapes and substitution. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 防护只检查明文命令，但 Shell 先运行 printf 产生新字符串，再把输出当作命令替换执行，形成二阶段解释。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: A control checks plaintext commands while the shell first runs printf to produce a new string and then executes the output through command substitution. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 将编码内容替换为只输出固定标记的无害命令，分别比较单引号、双引号、$() 和反引号，不读取真实文件。 审计需同时显示 printf 子进程及其解码后命令，且固定标记来自第二阶段执行；解码文本回显本身不足。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Replace encoded content with a harmless fixed-marker command and compare quoting and substitution forms without reading real files. Audit must show both the printf process and decoded command, with the fixed marker produced by second-stage execution; decoded reflection alone is insufficient. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 移除 Shell 和动态命令替换，允许的业务动作映射到固定函数；对编码输入解码一次后按数据类型验证。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Remove shell and dynamic substitution, map allowed actions to fixed functions, and decode encoded input once before type validation. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认十六进制解码与命令替换适用边界
title.en: Confirm the Hex Decoding and Command Substitution boundary

description.zh: 集合同时覆盖单引号、双引号及两种命令替换语法，适用于支持 printf 转义与命令替换的 Unix Shell。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: Covers single and double quotes plus two command-substitution forms in Unix shells that support printf escapes and substitution. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控十六进制解码与命令替换样例
title.en: Submit a controlled Hex Decoding and Command Substitution case

description.zh: 将编码内容替换为只输出固定标记的无害命令，分别比较单引号、双引号、$() 和反引号，不读取真实文件。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: Replace encoded content with a harmless fixed-marker command and compare quoting and substitution forms without reading real files. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

title.zh: 核对十六进制解码与命令替换证据
title.en: Verify Hex Decoding and Command Substitution evidence

description.zh: 审计需同时显示 printf 子进程及其解码后命令，且固定标记来自第二阶段执行；解码文本回显本身不足。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: Audit must show both the printf process and decoded command, with the fixed marker produced by second-stage execution; decoded reflection alone is insufficient. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归十六进制解码与命令替换
title.en: Remediate and regress Hex Decoding and Command Substitution

description.zh: 移除 Shell 和动态命令替换，允许的业务动作映射到固定函数；对编码输入解码一次后按数据类型验证。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Remove shell and dynamic substitution, map allowed actions to fixed functions, and decode encoded input once before type validation. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: 十六进制内容由 Shell 二次解释，是命令注入 Payload。

prerequisites.zh: 目标环境存在兼容的 Base64 解码器，且应用确实把解码输出送入 Shell 命令替换。
prerequisites.en: A compatible Base64 decoder exists and the application actually sends decoded output into shell command substitution.

prerequisites.zh: 使用编码后的固定 echo 令牌，同时保留只解码不执行和非法编码两个对照。
prerequisites.en: Use an encoded fixed echo token and retain decode-only and invalid-encoding controls.

analysis.zh: 阳性必须出现解码进程之后的独立标记命令，且只解码对照不会创建该进程。Base64 字符串被接受、明文出现在响应、或解码器退出码为零均属于假阳性边界。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires an independent marker command after the decoder while the decode-only control creates no such process. Accepted Base64, reflected plaintext, or a zero decoder exit status are false-positive boundaries.

opsecTips.zh: 一旦验证解码结果被执行就停止，不使用原始编码内容访问文件系统或执行身份命令。
opsecTips.en: Stop as soon as decoded output execution is proven; do not use source encodings to access files or run identity commands.

opsecTips.zh: 清除测试令牌、命令历史与解码缓存，并检查没有临时脚本或管道进程继续运行。
opsecTips.en: Clear test tokens, command history, and decoder caches, and verify that no temporary script or pipeline process remains.

name.zh: Base64 解码命令替换注入

description.zh: 将 Base64 文本解码后交给 $() 或反引号执行，验证明文黑名单是否被二阶段解析绕过。
description.en: Decodes Base64 text and executes it through $() or backticks to test whether two-stage parsing bypasses plaintext filtering.

overview.zh: Base64 解码命令替换注入用于这些样例依赖 base64 工具、Shell 管道与命令替换，需区分仅解码输出和真正执行解码结果。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: Base64-Decoded Command Substitution is intended for this boundary: These samples depend on a base64 utility, shell pipelines, and command substitution, and require distinguishing decoded output from actual execution. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 过滤在解码前检查输入，而后端 Shell 解码后再次解释结果；明文关键字因此直到防护之后才出现。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: Filtering occurs before decoding while the backend shell interprets the decoded result, causing blocked plaintext to appear only after inspection. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 用编码后的固定 echo 标记替代文件读取，分别测试只解码、命令替换和未完成编码负对照，并记录进程树。 成功要求解码工具之后产生独立命令进程和固定标记；仅显示解码字符串、退出码变化或 WAF 放行不成立。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Use an encoded fixed echo marker instead of file access, compare decode-only, command-substitution, and invalid-encoding controls, and record the process tree. Success requires a separate command process and fixed marker after the decoder; displaying decoded text, changing an exit code, or passing the WAF is insufficient. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 业务代码不得把解码结果送入 Shell；Base64 仅作为数据格式，解码后执行严格类型校验并使用固定程序 argv。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Never pass decoded content to a shell; treat Base64 only as a data format, validate the decoded type, and invoke a fixed program with argv. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认Base64 解码与命令替换适用边界
title.en: Confirm the Base64 Decoding and Command Substitution boundary

description.zh: 这些样例依赖 base64 工具、Shell 管道与命令替换，需区分仅解码输出和真正执行解码结果。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: These samples depend on a base64 utility, shell pipelines, and command substitution, and require distinguishing decoded output from actual execution. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控Base64 解码与命令替换样例
title.en: Submit a controlled Base64 Decoding and Command Substitution case

description.zh: 用编码后的固定 echo 标记替代文件读取，分别测试只解码、命令替换和未完成编码负对照，并记录进程树。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: Use an encoded fixed echo marker instead of file access, compare decode-only, command-substitution, and invalid-encoding controls, and record the process tree. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

attackChain.payload:
$(echo Y2F0IC9mbGFn|base64 -d)
$(echo aWQ=|base64 -d)
$(echo d2hvYW1p|base64 -d)
$(echo bHMgLw==|base64 -d)
$(echo cHdk|base64 -d)
$(echo dW5hbWUgLWE=|base64 -d)
$(echo aG9zdG5hbWU=|base64 -d)
`echo Y2F0IC9mbGFn|base64 -d`
`echo aWQ=|base64 -d`
`echo d2hvYW1p|base64 -d`
`echo bHMgLw==|base64 -d`
`echo cHdk|base64 -d`
`echo dW5hbWUgLWE=|base64 -d`
`echo aG9zdG5hbWU=|base64 -d`
$(echo$IFS Y2F0IC9mbGFn|base64$IFS -d)
`echo$IFS Y2F0IC9mbGFn|base64$IFS -d`
$(echo${IFS}Y2F0IC9mbGFn|base64${IFS}-d)
`echo${IFS}Y2F0IC9mbGFn|base64${IFS}-d`

title.zh: 核对Base64 解码与命令替换证据
title.en: Verify Base64 Decoding and Command Substitution evidence

description.zh: 成功要求解码工具之后产生独立命令进程和固定标记；仅显示解码字符串、退出码变化或 WAF 放行不成立。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: Success requires a separate command process and fixed marker after the decoder; displaying decoded text, changing an exit code, or passing the WAF is insufficient. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归Base64 解码与命令替换
title.en: Remediate and regress Base64 Decoding and Command Substitution

description.zh: 业务代码不得把解码结果送入 Shell；Base64 仅作为数据格式，解码后执行严格类型校验并使用固定程序 argv。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Never pass decoded content to a shell; treat Base64 only as a data format, validate the decoded type, and invoke a fixed program with argv. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: Base64 二阶段命令替换是实际注入载荷，不是编码工具说明。

prerequisites.zh: 已定位到文件读取、下载或路径拼接参数，而不是 URL 跳转或 Shell 命令参数。
prerequisites.en: Locate a file-read, download, or path-construction parameter rather than a redirect or shell-command argument.

prerequisites.zh: 允许目录外放置一个无敏感信息的标记文件，并能查看规范化后的绝对路径和文件访问审计。
prerequisites.en: Place a nonsensitive marker outside the allowed directory and observe the canonical absolute path and file-access audit.

analysis.zh: 阳性是后端文件 API 打开了允许根之外的标记文件，且路径审计与响应令牌一致。路径出现在错误页、服务器返回 400/500、或代理仅做一次解码但未发生文件访问都是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is the backend file API opening the marker outside the allowed root with matching path audit and response token. Paths in error pages, 400 or 500 responses, or one proxy decode without a file open are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 首个越界标记被读取后停止，不继续尝试系统配置、日志、凭据或设备文件。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the first out-of-root marker read and do not proceed to configuration, logs, credentials, or device files.

opsecTips.zh: 删除标记文件，清理下载缓存和临时规范化日志，并确认测试路径未进入持久任务。
opsecTips.en: Delete the marker, clear download caches and temporary canonicalization logs, and ensure the test path did not enter a persistent job.

name.zh: URL 编码路径穿越变体

description.zh: 使用单层、双层、反斜杠、过长 UTF-8 与控制字节编码测试路径规范化和根目录限制。
description.en: Uses single and double encoding, backslashes, overlong UTF-8, and control-byte variants to test path canonicalization and root enforcement.

overview.zh: URL 编码路径穿越变体用于原名称误称命令穿越，实际全部是 ../ 或反斜杠的编码路径片段，应在文件读取或下载参数中测试。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: URL-Encoded Path Traversal Variants is intended for this boundary: The source was mislabeled as command traversal; every line is an encoded ../ or backslash path fragment for file-read or download parameters. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 代理、框架和文件 API 解码次数或分隔符规则不同，校验前后的规范路径不一致时可逃离允许根目录。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: Proxies, frameworks, and file APIs may differ in decoding count or separators, allowing input to escape the allowed root when validation and canonical paths differ. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 使用允许目录外的无敏感标记文件，逐个测试一种编码并记录各层解码值、最终绝对路径和文件访问审计。 必须证明应用实际打开根目录外标记；错误页中的路径、回显的 ../ 或统一拒绝响应都不算文件读取。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Use a nonsensitive marker outside the allowed directory, test one encoding at a time, and record each decoded value, final absolute path, and file audit. The application must actually open the out-of-root marker; a path in an error page, reflected ../ text, or uniform denial is not a file read. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 规范化一次后验证最终绝对路径位于固定根下，拒绝绝对路径、反斜杠和非法编码，并用服务端对象 ID 映射。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Canonicalize once, ensure the final absolute path remains under a fixed root, reject absolute paths, backslashes, and invalid encodings, and map server-side object IDs. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认路径规范化绕过适用边界
title.en: Confirm the Path Canonicalization Bypass boundary

description.zh: 原名称误称命令穿越，实际全部是 ../ 或反斜杠的编码路径片段，应在文件读取或下载参数中测试。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: The source was mislabeled as command traversal; every line is an encoded ../ or backslash path fragment for file-read or download parameters. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控路径规范化绕过样例
title.en: Submit a controlled Path Canonicalization Bypass case

description.zh: 使用允许目录外的无敏感标记文件，逐个测试一种编码并记录各层解码值、最终绝对路径和文件访问审计。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: Use a nonsensitive marker outside the allowed directory, test one encoding at a time, and record each decoded value, final absolute path, and file audit. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

title.zh: 核对路径规范化绕过证据
title.en: Verify Path Canonicalization Bypass evidence

description.zh: 必须证明应用实际打开根目录外标记；错误页中的路径、回显的 ../ 或统一拒绝响应都不算文件读取。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: The application must actually open the out-of-root marker; a path in an error page, reflected ../ text, or uniform denial is not a file read. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归路径规范化绕过
title.en: Remediate and regress Path Canonicalization Bypass

description.zh: 规范化一次后验证最终绝对路径位于固定根下，拒绝绝对路径、反斜杠和非法编码，并用服务端对象 ID 映射。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Canonicalize once, ensure the final absolute path remains under a fixed root, reject absolute paths, backslashes, and invalid encodings, and map server-side object IDs. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: 全部内容是路径穿越片段，应改归文件漏洞而非命令注入。

prerequisites.zh: 已逐行确认 execution[0] 的 0-45 行分别属于 filter、内存流、data、expect、zip 和 phar 路径。
prerequisites.en: Confirm line by line that execution[0] indexes 0-45 belong to filter, memory-stream, data, expect, zip, and phar paths.

prerequisites.zh: 能从代码或日志识别目标 PHP API、allow_url_include、expect 扩展和归档/PHAR 处理配置。
prerequisites.en: Identify the target PHP API and settings for allow_url_include, the expect extension, archives, and PHAR handling from code or logs.

prerequisites.zh: 各拆分目标均使用无害标记文件、纯文本请求体或测试归档，而不是原始敏感路径和 PHP 命令。
prerequisites.en: Each split target uses a harmless marker file, plain-text body, or test archive rather than source sensitive paths and PHP commands.

analysis.zh: 该记录不能用一个阳性标准：filter 需证明源码/标记读取，data 需证明流被 include 解释，expect 需证明扩展执行，zip/phar 需证明归档成员或元数据处理。URI 被接受、PHP 警告或统一 500 都不能跨机制定性，也是必须 split 的直接证据。
analysis.en: This record has no single positive criterion: filter requires source or marker reads, data requires interpreted inclusion, expect requires extension execution, and zip or phar requires archive-member or metadata handling. URI acceptance, PHP warnings, and generic 500 responses cannot classify across mechanisms and directly justify the split.

opsecTips.zh: 每个机制首次获得无害阳性后立即停止该分支；不得跨分支升级为系统文件读取、命令执行或反序列化影响。
opsecTips.en: Stop each branch after its first harmless positive result; do not escalate across branches into system-file reads, command execution, or deserialization impact.

opsecTips.zh: 删除上传的测试归档与标记，清理 PHP 临时流、OPcache/应用缓存，并核对所有 46 行已按索引迁移且无复制残留。
opsecTips.en: Delete test archives and markers, clear PHP temporary streams and application or OPcache state, and verify all 46 lines were routed by index without duplicate residue.

name.zh: PHP Stream Wrapper 混合集（待拆分）

description.zh: 混合 php://filter 读取、data:// 包含、expect:// 执行、zip:// 归档成员和 phar:// 元数据路径，必须按处理机制拆分。
description.en: Mixes php://filter reads, data:// inclusion, expect:// execution, zip:// archive members, and phar:// metadata paths and must be split by processing mechanism.

overview.zh: PHP Stream Wrapper 混合集（待拆分）用于46 行覆盖读取、内存流、内联 PHP、命令执行、ZIP 成员与 PHAR 元数据，它们依赖的 PHP API、配置和影响完全不同。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: Mixed PHP Stream-Wrapper Corpus (Split Required) is intended for this boundary: The 46 lines cover reads, memory streams, inline PHP, command execution, ZIP members, and PHAR metadata with different APIs, settings, and impacts. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 用户输入直接进入 fopen、file_get_contents、include 或归档 API，且未限制 scheme 和目标；不同函数会读取、解释或反序列化流。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: User input reaches fopen, file_get_contents, include, or archive APIs without scheme and target restrictions, and different functions read, interpret, or deserialize streams. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 先从代码或日志确定具体 PHP API，再按行索引路由到 filter、data、expect、zip 或 phar 卡，每次只用无害标记。 必须分别证明源码解码、流包含、命令执行、归档成员访问或 PHAR 元数据处理；URI 被接受或统一错误不能共享结论。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Identify the exact PHP API from code or logs, then route line indexes to filter, data, expect, zip, or phar cards and use only a harmless marker. Separately prove source decoding, stream inclusion, command execution, archive-member access, or PHAR metadata handling; URI acceptance and generic errors cannot share one conclusion. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 文件读取使用对象映射和固定根，include 不接受用户输入，关闭不需要的 URL/expect wrapper，并升级 PHP 与依赖。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Use object mapping and a fixed root for reads, never pass user input to include, disable unneeded URL and expect wrappers, and patch PHP and dependencies. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认PHP Wrapper 机制拆分适用边界
title.en: Confirm the PHP Wrapper Mechanism Split boundary

description.zh: 46 行覆盖读取、内存流、内联 PHP、命令执行、ZIP 成员与 PHAR 元数据，它们依赖的 PHP API、配置和影响完全不同。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: The 46 lines cover reads, memory streams, inline PHP, command execution, ZIP members, and PHAR metadata with different APIs, settings, and impacts. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控PHP Wrapper 机制拆分样例
title.en: Submit a controlled PHP Wrapper Mechanism Split case

description.zh: 先从代码或日志确定具体 PHP API，再按行索引路由到 filter、data、expect、zip 或 phar 卡，每次只用无害标记。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: Identify the exact PHP API from code or logs, then route line indexes to filter, data, expect, zip, or phar cards and use only a harmless marker. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

title.zh: 核对PHP Wrapper 机制拆分证据
title.en: Verify PHP Wrapper Mechanism Split evidence

description.zh: 必须分别证明源码解码、流包含、命令执行、归档成员访问或 PHAR 元数据处理；URI 被接受或统一错误不能共享结论。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: Separately prove source decoding, stream inclusion, command execution, archive-member access, or PHAR metadata handling; URI acceptance and generic errors cannot share one conclusion. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归PHP Wrapper 机制拆分
title.en: Remediate and regress PHP Wrapper Mechanism Split

description.zh: 文件读取使用对象映射和固定根，include 不接受用户输入，关闭不需要的 URL/expect wrapper，并升级 PHP 与依赖。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Use object mapping and a fixed root for reads, never pass user input to include, disable unneeded URL and expect wrappers, and patch PHP and dependencies. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: 同一 command 项包含五种 Wrapper 机制和不同影响，必须按逐行索引拆分。

prerequisites.zh: 存在经授权的服务端 URL 获取功能，并已用外部回调证明请求由服务器而非浏览器发出。
prerequisites.en: An authorized server-side URL fetcher exists and an external callback proves requests originate from the server rather than the browser.

prerequisites.zh: 回环接口上部署一个只返回随机标记的测试服务，并明确允许测试的单一端口。
prerequisites.en: Deploy a loopback test service that returns only a random marker and designate one permitted port.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求 HTTP 客户端最终连接回环地址且测试服务记录服务器源与令牌。连接拒绝、超时差异、端口对应常见服务的猜测、或客户端浏览器访问 localhost 都是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the HTTP client to connect to loopback and the marker service to log the server source and token. Refused connections, timing differences, guessed common services, or browser access to localhost are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 一个回环端口返回标记后停止，不遍历其余 49 个地址/端口，也不接触真实本地服务。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one loopback port returns the marker; do not enumerate the other 49 combinations or touch real local services.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭标记服务，删除访问日志中的令牌并确认没有挂起连接、重试队列或健康检查残留。
opsecTips.en: Shut down the marker service, remove test tokens from access logs, and verify no pending connections, retries, or health checks remain.

name.zh: 回环地址服务端口 SSRF 探测

description.zh: 以 127.0.0.1、localhost、0.0.0.0 和 ::1 搭配常见端口，验证服务端取址与内网访问边界。
description.en: Combines 127.0.0.1, localhost, 0.0.0.0, and ::1 with common ports to test server-side destination and internal-access boundaries.

overview.zh: 回环地址服务端口 SSRF 探测用于条目是 SSRF 目标 URL，不是命令注入；应一次只验证一个已知测试服务，不能把端口表当作批量扫描任务。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: Loopback Service-Port SSRF Probes is intended for this boundary: These are SSRF target URLs rather than command injection; test one known controlled service at a time instead of treating the port list as a scan. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 服务端代表用户取 URL，却未在解析后阻断回环、未指定地址和 IPv6 本地地址，导致外部请求跨越网络信任边界。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: A server fetches user URLs without blocking loopback, unspecified, and IPv6-local addresses after resolution, crossing the network trust boundary. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 先使用受控外部回调证明服务端请求，再选择一个本机测试端口比较 127.0.0.1、localhost 与 ::1，并记录最终连接 IP。 需要目标测试服务访问日志或出站代理记录；响应超时、连接拒绝和端口特征猜测不能证明内部服务被读取。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Prove server-side fetching with a controlled external callback, then compare 127.0.0.1, localhost, and ::1 against one local test port and record the final connected IP. Require logs from the controlled target service or egress proxy; timeouts, connection refusals, and inferred port fingerprints do not prove an internal read. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 解析主机后校验所有 A/AAAA 地址，禁止回环、链路本地、私网和未指定地址，重定向后重复校验并实施出站允许列表。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Resolve and validate every A and AAAA address, block loopback, link-local, private, and unspecified ranges, revalidate redirects, and enforce an egress allowlist. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认回环服务端口探测适用边界
title.en: Confirm the Loopback Service-Port Probing boundary

description.zh: 条目是 SSRF 目标 URL，不是命令注入；应一次只验证一个已知测试服务，不能把端口表当作批量扫描任务。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: These are SSRF target URLs rather than command injection; test one known controlled service at a time instead of treating the port list as a scan. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控回环服务端口探测样例
title.en: Submit a controlled Loopback Service-Port Probing case

description.zh: 先使用受控外部回调证明服务端请求，再选择一个本机测试端口比较 127.0.0.1、localhost 与 ::1，并记录最终连接 IP。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: Prove server-side fetching with a controlled external callback, then compare 127.0.0.1, localhost, and ::1 against one local test port and record the final connected IP. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

title.zh: 核对回环服务端口探测证据
title.en: Verify Loopback Service-Port Probing evidence

description.zh: 需要目标测试服务访问日志或出站代理记录；响应超时、连接拒绝和端口特征猜测不能证明内部服务被读取。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: Require logs from the controlled target service or egress proxy; timeouts, connection refusals, and inferred port fingerprints do not prove an internal read. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归回环服务端口探测
title.en: Remediate and regress Loopback Service-Port Probing

description.zh: 解析主机后校验所有 A/AAAA 地址，禁止回环、链路本地、私网和未指定地址，重定向后重复校验并实施出站允许列表。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Resolve and validate every A and AAAA address, block loopback, link-local, private, and unspecified ranges, revalidate redirects, and enforce an egress allowlist. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: URL 直接作为 SSRF 请求目标，归入 SSRF Payload。

prerequisites.zh: 已确定生产使用的 URL 解析器及其对整数、八进制、十六进制和混合 IPv4 表示的支持。
prerequisites.en: Identify the production URL parser and its handling of integer, octal, hexadecimal, and mixed IPv4 notation.

prerequisites.zh: 准备一个受控回环 HTTP 标记服务，并可记录解析后的二进制地址与最终 socket 目标。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a controlled loopback HTTP marker service and capture both parsed binary addresses and final socket destinations.

analysis.zh: 阳性是原始主机不匹配回环字符串规则，但同一客户端规范化并连接到 127.0.0.1。解析器拒绝非规范形式、DNS 不发生、或只在离线工具中转换成功而应用未连接均是假阳性。
analysis.en: A positive result occurs when the raw host evades a loopback string rule but the same client canonicalizes and connects to 127.0.0.1. Parser rejection, absence of DNS, or offline conversion without an application connection are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 确认一个非规范形式到达标记服务后停止，不继续探测数据库、容器或管理端口。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one non-canonical form reaches the marker service and do not probe database, container, or management ports.

opsecTips.zh: 撤除本地标记监听，清理 DNS/HTTP 客户端缓存并保存最小化的规范 IP 证据。
opsecTips.en: Remove the loopback marker listener, clear DNS and HTTP-client caches, and retain only minimal canonical-IP evidence.

name.zh: 非规范回环 IP 表示 SSRF

description.zh: 使用十进制整数、八进制、十六进制和混合分段表示回环地址，测试 URL 解析器与过滤器的一致性。
description.en: Uses integer, octal, hexadecimal, and mixed-segment loopback representations to test consistency between URL parsers and destination filters.

subCategory.zh: 非规范 IP 解析绕过

overview.zh: 非规范回环 IP 表示 SSRF用于不同 URL 库可能接受历史 IPv4 数字格式并最终连接 127.0.0.1；测试必须记录解析后的规范 IP。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: Non-Canonical Loopback IP SSRF is intended for this boundary: Different URL libraries may accept legacy numeric IPv4 forms and ultimately connect to 127.0.0.1; testing must record the canonical resolved IP. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 安全检查按原始主机字符串匹配，而 HTTP 客户端采用另一套 IPv4 数字解析，校验值与连接目标因此分离。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: Security checks match the raw host string while the HTTP client applies different numeric IPv4 parsing, separating the validated value from the connected destination. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 在与生产相同的 URL 库中离线解析每种表示，再只对一个受控回环服务发送请求，并比较规范化前后地址。 HTTP 客户端连接日志必须显示最终目标是 127.0.0.1；输入被接受、DNS 未查询或连接失败都不是充分证据。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Parse each representation offline with the production URL library, then request one controlled loopback service and compare pre- and post-canonical addresses. HTTP client logs must show the final destination is 127.0.0.1; accepted input, absent DNS lookup, or connection failure is insufficient. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 使用单一标准 URL 解析器，拒绝非规范 IP 字面量，并对解析后的二进制地址分类；每次重定向与 DNS 解析后重新校验。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Use one standard URL parser, reject non-canonical IP literals, classify the parsed binary address, and revalidate after every redirect and DNS resolution. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认非规范 IP 解析绕过适用边界
title.en: Confirm the Non-Canonical IP Parsing Bypass boundary

description.zh: 不同 URL 库可能接受历史 IPv4 数字格式并最终连接 127.0.0.1；测试必须记录解析后的规范 IP。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: Different URL libraries may accept legacy numeric IPv4 forms and ultimately connect to 127.0.0.1; testing must record the canonical resolved IP. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控非规范 IP 解析绕过样例
title.en: Submit a controlled Non-Canonical IP Parsing Bypass case

description.en: Parse each representation offline with the production URL library, then request one controlled loopback service and compare pre- and post-canonical addresses. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

title.zh: 核对非规范 IP 解析绕过证据
title.en: Verify Non-Canonical IP Parsing Bypass evidence

description.zh: HTTP 客户端连接日志必须显示最终目标是 127.0.0.1；输入被接受、DNS 未查询或连接失败都不是充分证据。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: HTTP client logs must show the final destination is 127.0.0.1; accepted input, absent DNS lookup, or connection failure is insufficient. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归非规范 IP 解析绕过
title.en: Remediate and regress Non-Canonical IP Parsing Bypass

description.zh: 使用单一标准 URL 解析器，拒绝非规范 IP 字面量，并对解析后的二进制地址分类；每次重定向与 DNS 解析后重新校验。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。

Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: 这些是 URL 解析差异载荷，不是 IP 转换工具命令。

prerequisites.zh: 已确认 50 行均为独立 Windows CMD/原生命令，不包含请求闭合符、Shell 注入语境或 Payload 占位。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that all 50 lines are standalone Windows CMD or native commands without request closure, shell-injection context, or payload placeholders.

prerequisites.zh: 目标工具卡 windows-cmd-reference、post-exploitation-windows 与 internal-recon 存在，并已定义命令去重规则。
prerequisites.en: The destination tool cards windows-cmd-reference, post-exploitation-windows, and internal-recon exist with command-deduplication rules.

analysis.zh: 迁移证据是每行可直接在 CMD 中运行，用于身份、网络、进程、目录或文件查看，而不是改变另一个命令的语法。命令输出成功不能证明应用存在 RCE；只有独立入口探针、父进程和请求关联才可证明注入。
analysis.en: Migration evidence is that each line runs directly in CMD for identity, network, process, directory, or file inspection rather than altering another command's syntax. Successful output does not prove application RCE; injection requires an independent entry probe, parent process, and request correlation.

opsecTips.zh: 迁移审阅仅验证命令归属与去重，遇到 SAM、SYSTEM 或 Web 配置读取行时停止，不在真实主机执行。
opsecTips.en: Limit migration review to ownership and deduplication; stop at SAM, SYSTEM, or web-configuration read lines and do not execute them on a real host.

opsecTips.zh: 完成迁移后删除 Payload 导航引用和重复命令副本，清理审阅中产生的命令输出或敏感路径截图。
opsecTips.en: After migration, remove payload-navigation references and duplicate command copies, and delete command output or sensitive-path screenshots created during review.

name.zh: Windows 主机枚举与文件检查命令参考
name.en: Windows Host Enumeration and File-Inspection Reference

description.zh: 汇总 whoami、systeminfo、net、tasklist、dir 与 type 等 Windows 原生命令，属于系统命令速查而非注入字符串。
description.en: Catalogs native Windows commands such as whoami, systeminfo, net, tasklist, dir, and type and is a command reference rather than injection input.

overview.zh: Windows 主机枚举与文件检查命令参考用于50 行均是完整可独立运行的 Windows CLI，用于身份、网络、进程、目录和配置文件检查，没有注入闭合符或请求上下文。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: Windows Host Enumeration and File-Inspection Reference is intended for this boundary: All 50 lines are standalone Windows CLI commands for identity, network, process, directory, and configuration inspection, with no injection closure or request context. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 原记录把后渗透命令清单误放在 RCE Payload 分类；命令本身不能证明应用存在命令注入。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: The source misplaced a post-exploitation command catalog in RCE payloads; the commands themselves do not prove application command injection. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 按身份/网络、目录枚举和文件查看三组迁入现有 Windows 工具卡，保留原行顺序并标注权限和敏感文件边界。 工具卡成功仅表示命令在已授权主机产生预期输出；是否存在 RCE 必须由独立注入入口、进程父链和请求关联证明。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Move the lines by identity/network, directory enumeration, and file inspection into existing Windows tool cards while preserving order and privilege boundaries. Tool success means only that a command produced expected output on an authorized host; RCE requires independent proof from an injection point, process ancestry, and request correlation. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 迁移内容所有权后，Payload 库只保留能改变解释器语法的字符串；工具卡明确最小权限、输出敏感度和审计要求。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: After ownership migration, retain only interpreter-altering strings in the payload library and document least privilege, output sensitivity, and auditing in tool cards. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认Windows CMD 枚举命令适用边界
title.en: Confirm the Windows CMD Enumeration Commands boundary

description.zh: 50 行均是完整可独立运行的 Windows CLI，用于身份、网络、进程、目录和配置文件检查，没有注入闭合符或请求上下文。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: All 50 lines are standalone Windows CLI commands for identity, network, process, directory, and configuration inspection, with no injection closure or request context. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控Windows CMD 枚举命令样例
title.en: Submit a controlled Windows CMD Enumeration Commands case

description.zh: 按身份/网络、目录枚举和文件查看三组迁入现有 Windows 工具卡，保留原行顺序并标注权限和敏感文件边界。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: Move the lines by identity/network, directory enumeration, and file inspection into existing Windows tool cards while preserving order and privilege boundaries. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

title.zh: 核对Windows CMD 枚举命令证据
title.en: Verify Windows CMD Enumeration Commands evidence

description.zh: 工具卡成功仅表示命令在已授权主机产生预期输出；是否存在 RCE 必须由独立注入入口、进程父链和请求关联证明。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: Tool success means only that a command produced expected output on an authorized host; RCE requires independent proof from an injection point, process ancestry, and request correlation. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归Windows CMD 枚举命令
title.en: Remediate and regress Windows CMD Enumeration Commands

description.zh: 迁移内容所有权后，Payload 库只保留能改变解释器语法的字符串；工具卡明确最小权限、输出敏感度和审计要求。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: After ownership migration, retain only interpreter-altering strings in the payload library and document least privilege, output sensitivity, and auditing in tool cards. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: 整条记录是独立 Windows CLI/后渗透速查，不是 Payload，应迁往现有工具命令。

prerequisites.zh: 资产清单已给出一个明确授权的 RFC 1918 测试网段与标记服务，不允许把列表当作全网段扫描。
prerequisites.en: The asset inventory identifies one authorized RFC 1918 test segment and marker service; the list must not be used as a subnet scan.

prerequisites.zh: 出站代理或目标服务可记录服务器源地址、唯一请求令牌和最终端口。
prerequisites.en: An egress proxy or target service can record the server source, unique request token, and final port.

analysis.zh: 阳性是服务端获取器跨越外部边界访问已知内网标记服务。不同内网端口返回不同错误、私网地址导致超时、或扫描器猜到网关地址都不证明读取了内部资源。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is the server-side fetcher crossing the external boundary to an authorized internal marker. Different port errors, private-address timeouts, or guessing a gateway does not prove an internal resource was read.

opsecTips.zh: 收到首个内网标记回调即停止，不继续遍历 32 个组合或扩大到同网段其他主机。
opsecTips.en: Stop at the first internal marker callback and do not iterate the 32 combinations or expand to other hosts in the segment.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭测试服务、清除代理重试和连接池状态，并从报告中去除真实私网拓扑信息。
opsecTips.en: Shut down the test service, clear proxy retries and connection-pool state, and remove real private-topology details from the report.

name.zh: 私有网关与服务端口 SSRF 探测

description.zh: 使用 RFC 1918 网段常见网关地址和服务端口，验证服务端请求是否能跨越外部到内网边界。
description.en: Uses common gateway addresses and service ports in RFC 1918 ranges to test whether server-side requests cross from external to internal networks.

subCategory.zh: 私网目标 SSRF 探测

overview.zh: 私有网关与服务端口 SSRF 探测用于这些 URL 是受控 SSRF 目标候选，不是 C 段扫描命令；应根据资产清单只测试一个明确授权的内部标记服务。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: Private-Gateway and Service-Port SSRF Probes is intended for this boundary: These URLs are SSRF target candidates rather than subnet-scanning commands; select one explicitly authorized internal marker service from the asset inventory. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 服务端 URL 获取器缺少解析后私网地址检查或出站网络隔离，外部用户因此可借应用身份访问 RFC 1918 目标。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: The server-side fetcher lacks post-resolution private-address checks or egress isolation, allowing external users to reach RFC 1918 targets through the application identity. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 先确认出站请求原语，再从已知测试网段选择一个网关和端口，以不存在端口作负对照并限制单次请求。 内部标记服务日志必须记录应用源地址和唯一令牌；响应时间或不同错误文本不能替代实际内网连接证据。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Confirm the outbound-request primitive, then choose one gateway and port from a known test segment with a closed-port negative control and one request per case. The internal marker service must log the application source and unique token; timing or different errors cannot replace evidence of an internal connection. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 阻断私网、回环和链路本地地址，使用出站代理允许列表与网络 ACL，并在 DNS 与重定向后复核最终目标。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Block private, loopback, and link-local ranges, use an egress-proxy allowlist and network ACLs, and revalidate final destinations after DNS and redirects. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认私网目标 SSRF 探测适用边界
title.en: Confirm the Private-Network SSRF Probing boundary

description.zh: 这些 URL 是受控 SSRF 目标候选，不是 C 段扫描命令；应根据资产清单只测试一个明确授权的内部标记服务。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: These URLs are SSRF target candidates rather than subnet-scanning commands; select one explicitly authorized internal marker service from the asset inventory. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控私网目标 SSRF 探测样例
title.en: Submit a controlled Private-Network SSRF Probing case

description.zh: 先确认出站请求原语，再从已知测试网段选择一个网关和端口，以不存在端口作负对照并限制单次请求。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: Confirm the outbound-request primitive, then choose one gateway and port from a known test segment with a closed-port negative control and one request per case. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

title.zh: 核对私网目标 SSRF 探测证据
title.en: Verify Private-Network SSRF Probing evidence

description.zh: 内部标记服务日志必须记录应用源地址和唯一令牌；响应时间或不同错误文本不能替代实际内网连接证据。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: The internal marker service must log the application source and unique token; timing or different errors cannot replace evidence of an internal connection. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归私网目标 SSRF 探测
title.en: Remediate and regress Private-Network SSRF Probing

description.zh: 阻断私网、回环和链路本地地址，使用出站代理允许列表与网络 ACL，并在 DNS 与重定向后复核最终目标。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Block private, loopback, and link-local ranges, use an egress-proxy allowlist and network ACLs, and revalidate final destinations after DNS and redirects. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: 条目是私网 SSRF 目标 Payload，不是网络扫描工具 CLI。

prerequisites.zh: 已核实原标题“7条”与实际 execution[0] 六行不符，并按索引区分 file、Redis Gopher、FTP、TFTP 与 netdoc。
prerequisites.en: Verify that the title claims seven entries while execution[0] has six lines, indexed across file, Redis Gopher, FTP, TFTP, and netdoc.

prerequisites.zh: 分别具备无害标记文件、受控 Redis 和受控 FTP/TFTP 服务，避免用一个响应标准覆盖所有协议。
prerequisites.en: Have separate harmless marker files, a controlled Redis instance, and controlled FTP or TFTP services so one response criterion is not reused across protocols.

analysis.zh: split 的阳性证据按协议不同：0-1 需文件读取审计，2 需 Redis 解析 RESP，3-5 需相应服务器回调。URI 回显、统一不支持 scheme 错误、或任一协议成功都不能推断其他行有效。
analysis.en: Positive split evidence is protocol-specific: indexes 0-1 require file-read audit, index 2 requires Redis RESP parsing, and indexes 3-5 require matching server callbacks. URI reflection, a generic unsupported-scheme error, or success of one protocol says nothing about the others.

opsecTips.zh: 每个协议只验证一个无害标记，取得首个可归属证据后停止，禁止执行 Redis 写入或读取真实日志。
opsecTips.en: Validate one harmless marker per protocol and stop after the first attributable result; do not perform Redis writes or read real logs.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭临时协议服务、删除标记文件，并核对六行均迁入目标卡且原混合集不再保留导航入口。
opsecTips.en: Shut down temporary protocol services, delete marker files, and verify all six lines moved to target cards with no remaining navigation entry for the mixed source.

name.zh: 多协议 SSRF/File 混合集（待拆分）

description.zh: 六行内容混合 file 本地读取、Gopher Redis 请求、FTP、TFTP 与 netdoc，协议、后端和成功证据均不同。
description.en: The six lines mix local file reads, a Gopher Redis request, FTP, TFTP, and netdoc with different protocols, backends, and success evidence.

overview.zh: 多协议 SSRF/File 混合集（待拆分）用于原标题声称七条但实际只有六行，且 file:// 与网络协议不能共享一个攻击链或缓解模型。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: Mixed Multi-Protocol SSRF/File Corpus (Split Required) is intended for this boundary: The title claims seven entries but only six lines exist, and file:// cannot share one attack chain or mitigation model with network protocols. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: URL 获取器允许非 HTTP scheme，底层库会把同一输入交给文件系统或不同网络协议处理器，跨越不同信任边界。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: The URL fetcher permits non-HTTP schemes, causing the same input to reach filesystem or distinct network protocol handlers across different trust boundaries. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 按行索引把 file 行迁到 SSRF file 卡、Redis Gopher 行迁到 Redis 卡，其余协议迁到通用协议卡，并逐个使用无害标记。 file 需要真实文件读取审计，Gopher 需要后端协议日志，FTP/TFTP 需要受控服务器回调；统一错误或 URI 回显不可共用。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Route file lines to the SSRF file card, the Redis Gopher line to Redis, and remaining schemes to a protocol card, using one harmless marker at a time. file requires file-read audit, Gopher requires backend protocol logs, and FTP/TFTP require controlled server callbacks; generic errors or URI reflection are not shared evidence. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 只允许明确的 HTTPS 目标，禁用 file、gopher、ftp、tftp、netdoc 等 scheme，并用网络层出站策略限制后端。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Allow only explicit HTTPS targets, disable file, gopher, ftp, tftp, netdoc, and other schemes, and constrain backend egress at the network layer. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认多协议请求拆分适用边界
title.en: Confirm the Multi-Protocol Request Split boundary

description.en: The title claims seven entries but only six lines exist, and file:// cannot share one attack chain or mitigation model with network protocols. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控多协议请求拆分样例

description.zh: 按行索引把 file 行迁到 SSRF file 卡、Redis Gopher 行迁到 Redis 卡，其余协议迁到通用协议卡，并逐个使用无害标记。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。

Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

title.zh: 核对多协议请求拆分证据
title.en: Verify Multi-Protocol Request Split evidence

description.zh: file 需要真实文件读取审计，Gopher 需要后端协议日志，FTP/TFTP 需要受控服务器回调；统一错误或 URI 回显不可共用。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
