title.zh: 核对URL 解析器差异证据
title.en: Verify URL Parser Differentials evidence

description.zh: 最终 socket 目标与校验阶段地址必须形成可重复差异并有服务日志；字符串包含 127、解析报错或 DNS 查询不构成 SSRF。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: A repeatable difference between the validated address and final socket destination must be supported by service logs; containing 127, parse errors, or DNS lookup alone is insufficient. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归URL 解析器差异
title.en: Remediate and regress URL Parser Differentials

description.zh: 单一标准解析器完成规范化，拒绝 userinfo/fragment 混淆与非规范 IP，解析后分类所有地址，并在重定向和每次 DNS 后复检。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Canonicalize with one standard parser, reject userinfo or fragment confusion and non-canonical IPs, classify all resolved addresses, and revalidate after redirects and every DNS lookup. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: 这些 URL 是 SSRF 解析器差异载荷，应归 SSRF 分类。

prerequisites.zh: 已按 execution[0] 行 0、1、2 分别识别 Redis RESP、MySQL 握手占位和 FastCGI 帧占位。
prerequisites.en: Identify execution[0] lines 0, 1, and 2 as Redis RESP, a MySQL handshake placeholder, and a FastCGI frame placeholder.

prerequisites.zh: 具备隔离的 Redis、MySQL 与 FastCGI 测试服务以及各自协议日志，且仅发送无副作用握手/PING。
prerequisites.en: Have isolated Redis, MySQL, and FastCGI services with protocol logs and send only harmless handshakes or PING messages.

analysis.zh: split 阳性必须逐后端证明协议解析：Redis 识别 RESP，MySQL 识别完整握手/包，FastCGI 识别记录头。仅 TCP 连接、Gopher URL 被接受、或原两条省略号占位导致错误都不能证明协议利用。
analysis.en: Positive split evidence is backend-specific parsing: Redis recognizes RESP, MySQL recognizes a complete handshake or packet, and FastCGI recognizes a record header. A TCP connection, accepted Gopher URL, or errors from the two ellipsis placeholders do not prove protocol exploitation.

opsecTips.zh: 每个后端最多完成一次无害协议确认即停止，禁止执行 Redis 写 WebShell、数据库命令或 FastCGI 脚本执行。
opsecTips.en: Stop each backend after one harmless protocol confirmation; do not perform Redis web-file writes, database commands, or FastCGI script execution.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭三个测试服务，回滚 Redis 配置与键、清除协议捕获，并核对三行只存在于各自目标卡。
opsecTips.en: Shut down all three test services, roll back Redis configuration and keys, clear protocol captures, and verify each line exists only in its target card.

name.zh: Gopher 后端协议混合集（待拆分）

description.zh: 三行分别面向 Redis、MySQL 与 FastCGI，协议帧、权限条件和影响不同，不能保留为单一 Gopher 攻击链。
description.en: The three lines target Redis, MySQL, and FastCGI with different frames, privileges, and impacts and cannot remain one Gopher attack chain.

overview.zh: Gopher 后端协议混合集（待拆分）用于第一行是完整 Redis RESP 写文件链，后两行是截断的 MySQL 与 FastCGI 帧占位；每行必须由对应后端卡解释。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: Mixed Gopher Backend-Protocol Corpus (Split Required) is intended for this boundary: The first line is a full Redis RESP file-write chain while the latter two are truncated MySQL and FastCGI frame placeholders; each needs a backend-specific card. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 服务端允许 gopher:// 并能连接内网 TCP 服务时，URL 路径字节可被下游协议解析；成功条件由各服务认证和配置决定。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: When a server permits gopher:// and can reach internal TCP services, URL-path bytes may be parsed by downstream protocols, with success determined by each service's authentication and configuration. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 按行索引路由到 Redis、MySQL 和通用 Gopher/FastCGI 卡，先使用只读 PING 或无副作用帧证明协议到达，不执行写文件链。 Redis、MySQL 或 FastCGI 服务日志必须解析出对应帧；TCP 连接、URL 接受或截断数据报错都不能共享成功结论。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Route indexes to Redis, MySQL, and generic Gopher/FastCGI cards and first prove protocol reachability with read-only PING or harmless frames rather than file writes. Redis, MySQL, or FastCGI logs must parse the matching frame; TCP connection, URL acceptance, or truncated-frame errors cannot share a success conclusion. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 禁用 gopher 和非 HTTP scheme，限制内网出站，要求后端认证并绑定受信接口；对 Redis 和 FastCGI 额外收紧文件与脚本权限。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Disable gopher and non-HTTP schemes, restrict internal egress, require backend authentication and trusted-interface binding, and tighten file and script privileges for Redis and FastCGI. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认Gopher 后端协议拆分适用边界
title.en: Confirm the Gopher Backend-Protocol Split boundary

description.zh: 第一行是完整 Redis RESP 写文件链，后两行是截断的 MySQL 与 FastCGI 帧占位；每行必须由对应后端卡解释。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: The first line is a full Redis RESP file-write chain while the latter two are truncated MySQL and FastCGI frame placeholders; each needs a backend-specific card. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控Gopher 后端协议拆分样例
title.en: Submit a controlled Gopher Backend-Protocol Split case

description.zh: 按行索引路由到 Redis、MySQL 和通用 Gopher/FastCGI 卡，先使用只读 PING 或无副作用帧证明协议到达，不执行写文件链。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: Route indexes to Redis, MySQL, and generic Gopher/FastCGI cards and first prove protocol reachability with read-only PING or harmless frames rather than file writes. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

title.zh: 核对Gopher 后端协议拆分证据
title.en: Verify Gopher Backend-Protocol Split evidence

description.zh: Redis、MySQL 或 FastCGI 服务日志必须解析出对应帧；TCP 连接、URL 接受或截断数据报错都不能共享成功结论。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: Redis, MySQL, or FastCGI logs must parse the matching frame; TCP connection, URL acceptance, or truncated-frame errors cannot share a success conclusion. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归Gopher 后端协议拆分
title.en: Remediate and regress Gopher Backend-Protocol Split

description.zh: 禁用 gopher 和非 HTTP scheme，限制内网出站，要求后端认证并绑定受信接口；对 Redis 和 FastCGI 额外收紧文件与脚本权限。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Disable gopher and non-HTTP schemes, restrict internal egress, require backend authentication and trusted-interface binding, and tighten file and script privileges for Redis and FastCGI. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: 三行目标后端协议不同，且两行只是截断帧，必须逐行路由。

prerequisites.zh: 第三方 rbndr.us 当前解析行为、TTL 和返回地址顺序已在隔离解析器中确认。
prerequisites.en: Confirm current rbndr.us resolution behavior, TTL, and address order in an isolated resolver.

prerequisites.zh: 外部与回环两端均为受控标记服务，且 HTTP 客户端的 DNS 缓存/重试行为可观测。
prerequisites.en: Both external and loopback endpoints are controlled marker services, and HTTP-client DNS caching and retries are observable.

analysis.zh: 阳性需权威/递归 DNS 日志显示校验与连接使用了不同答案，并由内部标记服务收到同一令牌。域名能解析两个 IP、TTL 很低、首答为外部或第三方服务偶发失败都不代表 rebinding 成功。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires DNS logs showing different answers at validation and connection and the internal marker receiving the same token. Resolving two IPs, a low TTL, an external first answer, or third-party instability does not prove rebinding.

opsecTips.zh: 一旦受控回环端收到令牌就停止，不把域名对替换为云元数据或真实私网地址。
opsecTips.en: Stop once the controlled loopback endpoint receives the token; do not replace address pairs with cloud metadata or real private hosts.

opsecTips.zh: 清除解析器/客户端缓存，关闭两个标记服务，并从测试记录中删除第三方域名令牌和内部地址。
opsecTips.en: Clear resolver and client caches, shut down both marker services, and remove third-party domain tokens and internal addresses from test records.

name.zh: rbndr.us DNS Rebinding 地址切换

description.zh: 使用 rbndr.us 双地址域名在回环、链路本地与私网地址间切换，验证 DNS 校验和连接阶段是否分离。
description.en: Uses rbndr.us dual-address hostnames that alternate among loopback, link-local, and private addresses to test separation between DNS validation and connection.

subCategory.zh: 公共 Rebinding 域名探测

overview.zh: rbndr.us DNS Rebinding 地址切换用于每个域名编码一对候选地址，行为依赖第三方 DNS 当前服务与缓存；只应在隔离环境和受控目标上验证。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: rbndr.us DNS Rebinding Address Switching is intended for this boundary: Each hostname encodes two candidate addresses and depends on current third-party DNS and caching behavior; validate only in isolation against controlled targets. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 应用只校验首次 DNS 结果或缓存主机字符串，后续解析可能返回受阻地址，形成检查时与使用时差异。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: The application validates only the first DNS result or caches the host string, while later resolution may return a blocked address and create a time-of-check/time-of-use gap. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 记录连续 DNS 查询、TTL 和所有 A/AAAA 结果，再让服务端请求一个受控回环标记端口；不访问元数据或真实内网服务。 必须证明校验阶段和连接阶段解析结果不同，且受控服务收到请求；第三方 DNS 不可用、单次解析或 URL 回显不成立。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Record consecutive DNS responses, TTLs, and all A/AAAA answers, then request a controlled loopback marker port without touching metadata or real internal services. Prove that validation and connection resolved differently and that the controlled service received the request; third-party DNS failure, one lookup, or URL reflection is insufficient. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 校验并固定解析后的允许地址，连接时使用固定 IP 与正确 Host/SNI；重定向和重解析均重新执行地址分类，并限制出站。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Validate and pin allowed resolved addresses, connect to the pinned IP with correct Host and SNI, reclassify on redirects and re-resolution, and restrict egress. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认公共 Rebinding 域名探测适用边界
title.en: Confirm the Public Rebinding-Domain Probing boundary

description.zh: 每个域名编码一对候选地址，行为依赖第三方 DNS 当前服务与缓存；只应在隔离环境和受控目标上验证。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: Each hostname encodes two candidate addresses and depends on current third-party DNS and caching behavior; validate only in isolation against controlled targets. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控公共 Rebinding 域名探测样例
title.en: Submit a controlled Public Rebinding-Domain Probing case

description.zh: 记录连续 DNS 查询、TTL 和所有 A/AAAA 结果，再让服务端请求一个受控回环标记端口；不访问元数据或真实内网服务。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: Record consecutive DNS responses, TTLs, and all A/AAAA answers, then request a controlled loopback marker port without touching metadata or real internal services. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

title.zh: 核对公共 Rebinding 域名探测证据
title.en: Verify Public Rebinding-Domain Probing evidence

description.zh: 必须证明校验阶段和连接阶段解析结果不同，且受控服务收到请求；第三方 DNS 不可用、单次解析或 URL 回显不成立。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: Prove that validation and connection resolved differently and that the controlled service received the request; third-party DNS failure, one lookup, or URL reflection is insufficient. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归公共 Rebinding 域名探测
title.en: Remediate and regress Public Rebinding-Domain Probing

description.zh: 校验并固定解析后的允许地址，连接时使用固定 IP 与正确 Host/SNI；重定向和重解析均重新执行地址分类，并限制出站。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Validate and pin allowed resolved addresses, connect to the pinned IP with correct Host and SNI, reclassify on redirects and re-resolution, and restrict egress. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: 域名是 DNS Rebinding SSRF Payload，不是 DNS 工具命令。

prerequisites.zh: 已从 nip.io 官方实现和实时 DNS 查询确认嵌入 IPv4 的主机名当前解析规则。
prerequisites.en: Confirm current embedded-IPv4 hostname resolution from the nip.io implementation and live DNS queries.

prerequisites.zh: 选择一个解析到受控回环服务的 URL，并能记录 A/AAAA、TTL、最终连接 IP 与请求令牌。
prerequisites.en: Choose one URL resolving to a controlled loopback service and record A or AAAA answers, TTL, final IP, and request token.

analysis.zh: 阳性是主机字符串绕过表面规则后，应用最终连接 nip.io 解析出的内网/回环标记服务。只获得 A 记录、访问 nip.io 公共页面、连接被防火墙拒绝或浏览器发起请求都是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is the application connecting to the internal or loopback marker resolved through nip.io after bypassing a superficial host rule. An A record alone, the nip.io landing page, firewall rejection, or a browser-originated request is false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 一个 nip.io 主机成功到达标记端口后停止，不遍历数据库、Kubernetes 或元数据端口列表。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one nip.io host reaches the marker port; do not enumerate database, Kubernetes, or metadata ports.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭标记服务并清理 DNS/HTTP 缓存，删除访问日志中的完整内网 URL 和令牌。
opsecTips.en: Shut down the marker service, clear DNS and HTTP caches, and remove full internal URLs and tokens from access logs.

name.zh: nip.io 通配 DNS SSRF 目标

description.zh: 使用把 IPv4 嵌入主机名的 nip.io 域名指向回环、链路本地和私网服务，测试主机名允许列表缺口。
description.en: Uses nip.io hostnames embedding IPv4 addresses to resolve to loopback, link-local, and private services and test hostname-allowlist gaps.

subCategory.zh: nip.io 通配 DNS 解析

overview.zh: nip.io 通配 DNS SSRF 目标用于这些 URL 利用看似域名的主机解析为内网 IP；必须先确认 nip.io 当前解析结果并只测试一个受控服务。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: nip.io Wildcard-DNS SSRF Targets is intended for this boundary: These URLs use domain-looking hosts that resolve to internal IPs; confirm current nip.io resolution and test only one controlled service. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 校验只检查主机字符串后缀或拒绝 IP 字面量，却未解析并分类 DNS 结果，通配 DNS 因此绕过表面规则。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: Validation checks a hostname suffix or rejects IP literals without resolving and classifying DNS answers, allowing wildcard DNS to bypass superficial rules. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 离线查询 A/AAAA 和 TTL，记录嵌入地址与实际结果，再由应用请求一个固定标记路径并捕获最终连接 IP。 受控内网服务日志和 HTTP 客户端连接地址必须一致；DNS 成功、HTTP 状态差异或第三方首页都不能证明 SSRF。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Query A/AAAA and TTL offline, compare embedded and actual addresses, then have the application request one fixed marker path and capture the final IP. Controlled internal-service logs and the HTTP client's connected address must agree; DNS success, status differences, or a third-party landing page do not prove SSRF. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 对解析后的所有地址执行网段阻断，避免基于字符串后缀允许 URL，并在每次重定向和 DNS 刷新后重新校验。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Block disallowed ranges across all resolved addresses, avoid string-suffix URL approval, and revalidate after each redirect and DNS refresh. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认nip.io 通配 DNS 解析适用边界
title.en: Confirm the nip.io Wildcard-DNS Resolution boundary

description.zh: 这些 URL 利用看似域名的主机解析为内网 IP；必须先确认 nip.io 当前解析结果并只测试一个受控服务。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: These URLs use domain-looking hosts that resolve to internal IPs; confirm current nip.io resolution and test only one controlled service. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控nip.io 通配 DNS 解析样例
title.en: Submit a controlled nip.io Wildcard-DNS Resolution case

description.zh: 离线查询 A/AAAA 和 TTL，记录嵌入地址与实际结果，再由应用请求一个固定标记路径并捕获最终连接 IP。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: Query A/AAAA and TTL offline, compare embedded and actual addresses, then have the application request one fixed marker path and capture the final IP. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

title.zh: 核对nip.io 通配 DNS 解析证据
title.en: Verify nip.io Wildcard-DNS Resolution evidence

description.zh: 受控内网服务日志和 HTTP 客户端连接地址必须一致；DNS 成功、HTTP 状态差异或第三方首页都不能证明 SSRF。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: Controlled internal-service logs and the HTTP client's connected address must agree; DNS success, status differences, or a third-party landing page do not prove SSRF. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归nip.io 通配 DNS 解析
title.en: Remediate and regress nip.io Wildcard-DNS Resolution

description.zh: 对解析后的所有地址执行网段阻断，避免基于字符串后缀允许 URL，并在每次重定向和 DNS 刷新后重新校验。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Block disallowed ranges across all resolved addresses, avoid string-suffix URL approval, and revalidate after each redirect and DNS refresh. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: nip.io URL 是主机名到内网地址的 SSRF 载荷。

prerequisites.zh: 已独立查询 sslip.io 的 A/AAAA 与 TTL，不沿用 nip.io 的行为假设。
prerequisites.en: Query sslip.io A or AAAA records and TTL independently rather than assuming nip.io behavior.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离环境有一个对应嵌入 IP 的无敏感标记服务，可区分服务器请求和本地浏览器请求。
prerequisites.en: An isolated environment has a nonsensitive marker service at the embedded IP and can distinguish server requests from local browser requests.

analysis.zh: 阳性需 sslip.io 域名通过输入检查后解析并由服务端 socket 连接标记目标。DNS 记录存在、URL 被保存、响应状态变化或开发者浏览器访问都不能证明服务端 SSRF。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires an sslip.io hostname to pass input checks, resolve, and be connected by the server-side socket to the marker. DNS existence, URL storage, status changes, or developer-browser access do not prove server-side SSRF.

opsecTips.zh: 首次确认服务端连接后停止，不测试该列表中的云元数据路径或其他真实内部服务。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the first confirmed server connection and do not test the list's cloud metadata paths or other real internal services.

opsecTips.zh: 撤销测试 DNS 缓存，关闭内部标记端口，并从代理和应用日志中移除唯一令牌。
opsecTips.en: Flush test DNS caches, close the internal marker port, and remove the unique token from proxy and application logs.

name.zh: sslip.io 通配 DNS SSRF 目标

description.zh: 使用 sslip.io 的嵌入 IP 主机名解析到回环、元数据和私网地址，验证 DNS 后地址分类。
description.en: Uses sslip.io hostnames with embedded IPs that resolve to loopback, metadata, and private addresses to test post-DNS classification.

subCategory.zh: sslip.io 通配 DNS 解析

overview.zh: sslip.io 通配 DNS SSRF 目标用于条目与 nip.io 服务独立，缓存、TTL 和 IPv4 嵌入规则需单独记录；不要假定两个公共服务行为相同。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: sslip.io Wildcard-DNS SSRF Targets is intended for this boundary: This service is independent from nip.io, so caching, TTL, and IPv4 embedding rules require separate observation rather than assuming identical behavior. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 应用把 DNS 名视为安全而不检查其解析地址，攻击者可用通配 DNS 将合法外观主机绑定到内部目标。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: The application treats DNS names as safe without inspecting resolved addresses, allowing wildcard DNS to bind a domain-looking host to an internal target. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 查询当前 DNS 结果并选择一个受控回环端口，用唯一请求令牌比较原始主机、解析 IP 和实际连接目标。 最终 socket 和受控服务访问日志必须显示内部目标；只得到 DNS A 记录或公共服务页面不是漏洞证据。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Resolve the current DNS answer, choose one controlled loopback port, and compare original host, resolved IP, and connected destination with a unique token. The final socket and controlled-service log must show the internal destination; obtaining a DNS A record or public service page is not vulnerability evidence. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 解析后阻断回环、私网和链路本地地址，固定允许目的地，限制 DNS 重解析和出站网络，并重检重定向。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Block loopback, private, and link-local addresses after resolution, pin allowed destinations, constrain DNS re-resolution and egress, and recheck redirects. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认sslip.io 通配 DNS 解析适用边界
title.en: Confirm the sslip.io Wildcard-DNS Resolution boundary

description.zh: 条目与 nip.io 服务独立，缓存、TTL 和 IPv4 嵌入规则需单独记录；不要假定两个公共服务行为相同。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: This service is independent from nip.io, so caching, TTL, and IPv4 embedding rules require separate observation rather than assuming identical behavior. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控sslip.io 通配 DNS 解析样例
title.en: Submit a controlled sslip.io Wildcard-DNS Resolution case

description.zh: 查询当前 DNS 结果并选择一个受控回环端口，用唯一请求令牌比较原始主机、解析 IP 和实际连接目标。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: Resolve the current DNS answer, choose one controlled loopback port, and compare original host, resolved IP, and connected destination with a unique token. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

title.zh: 核对sslip.io 通配 DNS 解析证据
title.en: Verify sslip.io Wildcard-DNS Resolution evidence

description.zh: 最终 socket 和受控服务访问日志必须显示内部目标；只得到 DNS A 记录或公共服务页面不是漏洞证据。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: The final socket and controlled-service log must show the internal destination; obtaining a DNS A record or public service page is not vulnerability evidence. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归sslip.io 通配 DNS 解析
title.en: Remediate and regress sslip.io Wildcard-DNS Resolution

description.zh: 解析后阻断回环、私网和链路本地地址，固定允许目的地，限制 DNS 重解析和出站网络，并重检重定向。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Block loopback, private, and link-local addresses after resolution, pin allowed destinations, constrain DNS re-resolution and egress, and recheck redirects. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: sslip.io 域名是 SSRF DNS 解析绕过 Payload。

prerequisites.zh: 当前 1u.ms 对点分地址与十六进制标签的解析已通过独立 DNS 工具核对。
prerequisites.en: Verify current 1u.ms handling of dotted addresses and hexadecimal labels with an independent DNS tool.

prerequisites.zh: 使用一个受控目标地址，且可观察服务端校验值、DNS 答案和最终连接三者。
prerequisites.en: Use one controlled target address and observe the server's validated value, DNS answer, and final connection.

analysis.zh: 阳性是编码外观域名通过字符串校验，但解析结果属于禁止网段并被应用连接。域名格式包含十六进制、DNS 返回 NXDOMAIN/多地址、或离线换算出内网 IP而没有 socket 连接都属假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is a domain-looking encoded host passing string validation, resolving into a blocked range, and being connected by the application. Hex-looking labels, NXDOMAIN or multiple answers, or offline conversion without a socket connection are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 确认一个编码域名到达受控服务后停止，不对六个样例逐个打真实地址。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one encoded hostname reaches the controlled service; do not send all six samples to real addresses.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试 DNS 查询记录中的内部地址，清除解析/连接缓存并关闭标记监听器。
opsecTips.en: Remove internal addresses from test DNS records, clear resolver and connection caches, and close the marker listener.

name.zh: 1u.ms 编码地址 DNS SSRF 目标

description.zh: 使用域名标签同时携带点分地址与十六进制地址，验证主机字符串检查是否忽略最终 DNS 目标。
description.en: Uses host labels containing both dotted and hexadecimal address forms to test whether hostname checks ignore the final DNS destination.

overview.zh: 1u.ms 编码地址 DNS SSRF 目标用于六个样例分别指向回环、链路本地和 RFC 1918 地址；外部服务行为可能变化，需先独立解析并留存 TTL。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: 1u.ms Encoded-Address DNS SSRF Targets is intended for this boundary: The six samples target loopback, link-local, and RFC 1918 ranges; resolve independently and record TTL because external service behavior can change. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 过滤器按域名文本允许请求，HTTP 客户端随后使用 DNS 返回的受阻地址，校验对象和连接对象不一致。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: A filter approves the hostname text while the HTTP client uses a blocked address returned by DNS, making the validated and connected objects differ. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 在测试解析器中查询每个主机并只挑一个解析到受控标记服务的样例，记录 DNS、连接和请求令牌。 必须有解析后地址和受控服务日志的双重证据；域名格式看似编码 IP、解析超时或 NXDOMAIN 都不能确认。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Resolve each host in the test resolver, select only one that points to a controlled marker service, and record DNS, connection, and request token. Require both the post-resolution address and controlled-service log; a host that resembles an encoded IP, times out, or returns NXDOMAIN proves nothing. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 不要依赖域名外观，解析全部结果并做二进制地址分类；固定允许地址并通过出站代理阻断内网和元数据。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Do not trust hostname appearance; classify every resolved binary address, pin allowed destinations, and block internal and metadata ranges through an egress proxy. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认编码地址通配 DNS适用边界
title.en: Confirm the Encoded-Address Wildcard DNS boundary

description.zh: 六个样例分别指向回环、链路本地和 RFC 1918 地址；外部服务行为可能变化，需先独立解析并留存 TTL。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: The six samples target loopback, link-local, and RFC 1918 ranges; resolve independently and record TTL because external service behavior can change. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控编码地址通配 DNS样例
title.en: Submit a controlled Encoded-Address Wildcard DNS case

description.zh: 在测试解析器中查询每个主机并只挑一个解析到受控标记服务的样例，记录 DNS、连接和请求令牌。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: Resolve each host in the test resolver, select only one that points to a controlled marker service, and record DNS, connection, and request token. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

title.zh: 核对编码地址通配 DNS证据
title.en: Verify Encoded-Address Wildcard DNS evidence

description.zh: 必须有解析后地址和受控服务日志的双重证据；域名格式看似编码 IP、解析超时或 NXDOMAIN 都不能确认。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: Require both the post-resolution address and controlled-service log; a host that resembles an encoded IP, times out, or returns NXDOMAIN proves nothing. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归编码地址通配 DNS
title.en: Remediate and regress Encoded-Address Wildcard DNS

description.zh: 不要依赖域名外观，解析全部结果并做二进制地址分类；固定允许地址并通过出站代理阻断内网和元数据。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Do not trust hostname appearance; classify every resolved binary address, pin allowed destinations, and block internal and metadata ranges through an egress proxy. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: 域名携带的编码地址用于 SSRF 目标绕过，仍是 Payload。

prerequisites.zh: 已确认 localtest.me 当前解析到回环地址，并记录测试主机的 hosts/DNS 覆盖情况。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that localtest.me currently resolves to loopback and record any hosts or DNS overrides on the test machine.

prerequisites.zh: 仅开放一个本地标记端口，并能证明请求由后端 URL 获取器而不是操作者浏览器发送。
prerequisites.en: Open only one local marker port and prove that requests come from the backend URL fetcher rather than the operator's browser.

analysis.zh: 阳性是仅拒绝 localhost 字符串的规则允许 localtest.me，随后后端连接回环标记服务。DNS 回环解析本身、关闭端口的错误差异、或前端预览请求都不构成服务端访问。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is a localhost-string rule allowing localtest.me followed by a backend connection to the loopback marker. Loopback DNS resolution alone, errors from a closed port, or a frontend preview request does not constitute server-side access.

opsecTips.zh: 标记端口收到一次后端请求即停止，不继续尝试列表中的数据库端口。
opsecTips.en: Stop when the marker port receives one backend request and do not continue to the listed database ports.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭本地服务，清理 DNS 与应用 URL 缓存，并删除测试令牌和回环访问日志。
opsecTips.en: Close the local service, clear DNS and application URL caches, and delete test tokens and loopback access logs.

name.zh: localtest.me 回环域名 SSRF 探测

description.zh: 使用解析到回环地址的 localtest.me 搭配服务端口，验证只拒绝 localhost 字符串的 SSRF 防护。
description.en: Uses localtest.me, which resolves to loopback, with service ports to test SSRF controls that reject only the localhost string.

overview.zh: localtest.me 回环域名 SSRF 探测用于三个 URL 都是同一回环别名的端口变体，应用应按解析后 IP 判断，而不是按域名文本决定安全性。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: localtest.me Loopback-Domain SSRF Probe is intended for this boundary: All three URLs are port variants of one loopback alias; the application must decide by resolved IP rather than hostname text. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 安全规则仅匹配 localhost 或 127.0.0.1，未解析其他域名；任何指向回环的公共域名都可绕过字符串规则。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: A control matches only localhost or 127.0.0.1 without resolving other names, so any public name pointing to loopback can bypass the string rule. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 先离线确认域名解析，再选择一个受控本地端口和一个关闭端口作对照，由应用各请求一次并记录连接。 本地标记服务必须收到应用请求且连接地址为回环；DNS 解析、端口错误差异或浏览器自行请求都不够。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Confirm resolution offline, then choose one controlled local port and one closed-port control, request each once through the application, and record connections. The local marker service must receive an application request with a loopback destination; DNS resolution, port-error differences, or browser-side requests are insufficient. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 对所有 DNS 结果进行地址分类并阻断回环，不为域名字符串设例外；使用出站允许列表限制端口和目标。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Classify every DNS result and block loopback without hostname exceptions, and constrain destinations and ports with an egress allowlist. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认回环别名域名解析适用边界
title.en: Confirm the Loopback Alias-Domain Resolution boundary

description.zh: 三个 URL 都是同一回环别名的端口变体，应用应按解析后 IP 判断，而不是按域名文本决定安全性。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: All three URLs are port variants of one loopback alias; the application must decide by resolved IP rather than hostname text. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控回环别名域名解析样例
title.en: Submit a controlled Loopback Alias-Domain Resolution case

description.zh: 先离线确认域名解析，再选择一个受控本地端口和一个关闭端口作对照，由应用各请求一次并记录连接。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: Confirm resolution offline, then choose one controlled local port and one closed-port control, request each once through the application, and record connections. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

title.zh: 核对回环别名域名解析证据
title.en: Verify Loopback Alias-Domain Resolution evidence

description.zh: 本地标记服务必须收到应用请求且连接地址为回环；DNS 解析、端口错误差异或浏览器自行请求都不够。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: The local marker service must receive an application request with a loopback destination; DNS resolution, port-error differences, or browser-side requests are insufficient. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归回环别名域名解析
title.en: Remediate and regress Loopback Alias-Domain Resolution

description.zh: 对所有 DNS 结果进行地址分类并阻断回环，不为域名字符串设例外；使用出站允许列表限制端口和目标。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Classify every DNS result and block loopback without hostname exceptions, and constrain destinations and ports with an egress allowlist. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: localtest.me URL 是解析后回环 SSRF 探针。

prerequisites.zh: 使用自有测试域配置可审计的低 TTL/交替 A 记录，不依赖示例 `rebind.attacker.com`。
prerequisites.en: Use an owned test domain with auditable low-TTL or alternating A records rather than the placeholder `rebind.attacker.com`.

prerequisites.zh: 受控外部和回环标记服务共享唯一请求令牌，且可观察校验、重试和连接的 DNS 查询序列。
prerequisites.en: Controlled external and loopback markers share a unique request token, and DNS lookups during validation, retry, and connection are observable.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求首次校验得到允许的外部地址，后续同一请求重新解析为回环并连接标记服务。TTL=0、多次查询、地址顺序变化或客户端固定首答而未访问内部端都不是利用。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires validation to receive an allowed external address and a later resolution for the same request to return loopback and reach the marker. TTL zero, repeated queries, answer reordering, or a client pinning the first answer without internal access is not exploitation.

opsecTips.zh: 首次观察检查时/使用时地址切换并到达回环后停止，不切换到元数据或私网数据库。
opsecTips.en: Stop at the first validation-to-use address switch reaching loopback; do not switch to metadata or private databases.

opsecTips.zh: 恢复测试 DNS 区的固定记录，等待缓存过期，关闭两端标记服务并删除唯一令牌。
opsecTips.en: Restore a fixed DNS record in the test zone, wait for caches to expire, shut down both marker services, and delete the unique token.

name.zh: 低 TTL DNS Rebinding SSRF 探测

description.zh: 使用低 TTL 或交替应答域名测试校验阶段与连接阶段是否发生不同 DNS 解析。
description.en: Uses low-TTL or alternating-answer hostnames to test whether validation and connection perform different DNS resolutions.

overview.zh: 低 TTL DNS Rebinding SSRF 探测用于rebind.attacker.com 是占位域名，实际测试必须由授权者控制 DNS，并明确首答外部、后答内部的时序。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: Low-TTL DNS Rebinding SSRF Probe is intended for this boundary: rebind.attacker.com is a placeholder; testing requires operator-controlled DNS with explicit external-first and internal-later timing. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 应用先解析并允许外部 IP，连接或重试时重新解析得到内部 IP，低 TTL 和未固定地址形成检查时/使用时竞态。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: The application approves an external IP from an initial lookup and re-resolves an internal IP during connection or retry, creating a TOCTOU race without address pinning. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 在隔离 DNS 区配置可审计的交替 A 记录，用受控外部与回环标记服务记录查询序列、TTL 和最终连接。 需要 DNS 权威日志证明两次答案不同，并由内部标记服务收到同一请求令牌；低 TTL 本身或多次查询不构成利用。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Configure auditable alternating A records in an isolated DNS zone and use controlled external and loopback marker services to record lookup order, TTL, and final connection. Authoritative DNS logs must show different answers and the internal marker must receive the same request token; low TTL or repeated queries alone is not exploitation. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 解析并固定已允许 IP，连接到固定地址且保持正确 Host/SNI；限制重新解析，重试和重定向必须重新执行完整地址策略。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Resolve and pin approved IPs, connect to the pinned address with correct Host and SNI, constrain re-resolution, and reapply full address policy on retries and redirects. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认DNS TOCTOU Rebinding适用边界
title.en: Confirm the DNS TOCTOU Rebinding boundary

description.zh: rebind.attacker.com 是占位域名，实际测试必须由授权者控制 DNS，并明确首答外部、后答内部的时序。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: rebind.attacker.com is a placeholder; testing requires operator-controlled DNS with explicit external-first and internal-later timing. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控DNS TOCTOU Rebinding样例
title.en: Submit a controlled DNS TOCTOU Rebinding case

description.zh: 在隔离 DNS 区配置可审计的交替 A 记录，用受控外部与回环标记服务记录查询序列、TTL 和最终连接。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: Configure auditable alternating A records in an isolated DNS zone and use controlled external and loopback marker services to record lookup order, TTL, and final connection. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

attackChain.payload:
http://rebind.attacker.com
http://rebind.attacker.com:8080
http://rebind.attacker.com:3306
http://rebind.attacker.com:6379
http://rebind.attacker.com:27017
http://rebind.attacker.com:9200
http://rebind.attacker.com:5432

title.zh: 核对DNS TOCTOU Rebinding证据
title.en: Verify DNS TOCTOU Rebinding evidence

description.zh: 需要 DNS 权威日志证明两次答案不同，并由内部标记服务收到同一请求令牌；低 TTL 本身或多次查询不构成利用。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: Authoritative DNS logs must show different answers and the internal marker must receive the same request token; low TTL or repeated queries alone is not exploitation. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归DNS TOCTOU Rebinding
title.en: Remediate and regress DNS TOCTOU Rebinding

description.zh: 解析并固定已允许 IP，连接到固定地址且保持正确 Host/SNI；限制重新解析，重试和重定向必须重新执行完整地址策略。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Resolve and pin approved IPs, connect to the pinned address with correct Host and SNI, constrain re-resolution, and reapply full address policy on retries and redirects. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: 低 TTL/交替应答是 SSRF 的 DNS Rebinding Payload 模型。

prerequisites.zh: 已按行确认 0-8 是 iframe/fetch 浏览器代码，9-10 是 DNS 配置占位，11-12 是服务端 URL。
prerequisites.en: Confirm by line that indexes 0-8 are iframe or fetch browser code, 9-10 are DNS configuration placeholders, and 11-12 are server-side URLs.

prerequisites.zh: 浏览器同源测试、权威 DNS 区和服务端 SSRF 测试使用彼此隔离的标记与日志。
prerequisites.en: Browser same-origin testing, the authoritative DNS zone, and server-side SSRF testing use isolated markers and logs.

prerequisites.zh: 目标 Payload/Tool 卡已存在，且 commandRouting 对 13 行全覆盖且无重叠。
prerequisites.en: Destination payload and tool cards exist, and commandRouting covers all 13 lines without overlap.

analysis.zh: split 的阳性边界不可互换：浏览器行需证明同源上下文中的脚本访问，DNS 行只证明配置/解析，服务端 URL 需证明后端出站连接。iframe 加载失败、CORS 阻止读取、DNS 指向内网或服务器未请求 URL 都不能跨类别推导成功。
analysis.en: Positive boundaries for the split are not interchangeable: browser lines require script access in an origin context, DNS lines prove only configuration or resolution, and server URLs require backend egress. Failed iframe loads, CORS-blocked reads, internal DNS answers, or a server not requesting the URL cannot imply success across categories.

opsecTips.zh: 每个执行主体取得一个最小证据后停止；禁止让浏览器脚本读取元数据正文或让服务端访问真实内网。
opsecTips.en: Stop each execution principal after one minimal proof; do not let browser scripts read metadata bodies or let the server access real internal networks.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试 iframe/script 页面和 DNS 记录，清空浏览器/DNS/HTTP 缓存，并核对 13 行已迁移且原混合入口移除。
opsecTips.en: Delete test iframe or script pages and DNS records, clear browser, DNS, and HTTP caches, and verify all 13 lines were routed and the mixed source entry was removed.

name.zh: 浏览器 DNS Rebinding 与 SSRF 混合集（待拆分）
name.en: Mixed Browser DNS-Rebinding and SSRF Corpus (Split Required)

description.zh: 混合 iframe、fetch 脚本、DNS 配置主机名和通配 DNS URL，客户端同源攻击与服务端 SSRF 不能共用一条攻击链。
description.en: Mixes iframe and fetch scripts, DNS configuration hostnames, and wildcard-DNS URLs, so browser same-origin attacks and server-side SSRF cannot share one attack chain.

subCategory.zh: 浏览器与服务端 Rebinding 拆分

overview.zh: 浏览器 DNS Rebinding 与 SSRF 混合集（待拆分）用于0-8 行是浏览器 HTML/JavaScript，9-10 行是 DNS 区配置占位，11-12 行才是服务端 URL；执行主体和证据不同。 审校时先确认执行主体、解析器、平台和授权测试对象，并保留未修改请求或命令作为正常基线。
overview.en: Mixed Browser DNS-Rebinding and SSRF Corpus (Split Required) is intended for this boundary: Lines 0-8 are browser HTML or JavaScript, 9-10 are DNS-zone placeholders, and 11-12 are server-side URLs, with different execution principals and evidence. Confirm the execution principal, parser, platform, and authorized test object, and retain an unmodified baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 浏览器攻击依赖同源与 DNS 缓存变化，服务端 SSRF 依赖 URL 获取器；把二者合并会错误地将浏览器请求当成服务器请求。 结论必须落到实际信任边界，不能把字符串外观、工具输出或中间层状态变化直接当成漏洞。
vulnerability.en: Browser attacks depend on origin and DNS-cache changes while SSRF depends on a server URL fetcher; combining them wrongly attributes browser traffic to the server. The conclusion must identify the real trust boundary rather than treating string appearance, tool output, or intermediary status changes as a vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 按索引把 iframe/fetch 路由到 DNS Rebinding Payload，把域名配置迁 DNS 工具卡，把两个通配 URL 路由到 SSRF 绕过卡。 浏览器侧需同源和 DevTools/服务日志，DNS 配置需权威解析记录，SSRF 需服务端出站和目标日志；三类证据不可互换。 全程关联原始输入、规范化结果、进程或网络日志和最终业务影响，形成可重复的阳性与阴性证据。
exploitation.en: Route iframe and fetch lines to DNS-rebinding payloads, DNS placeholders to the DNS tool card, and the two wildcard URLs to the SSRF-bypass card. Browser cases require origin and browser or service logs, DNS configuration requires authoritative lookup records, and SSRF requires server egress and target logs; evidence is not interchangeable. Correlate raw input, canonicalized values, process or network logs, and final business impact to build repeatable positive and negative evidence.

mitigation.zh: 浏览器服务校验 Host/Origin 并采用网络隔离，服务端获取器解析后阻断内网；DNS 工具配置使用独立测试域并清理记录。 修复后用同一正常、阳性和阴性样例回归，确认合法功能保留，原先跨越解释器、文件或网络边界的差异消失。
mitigation.en: Browser-facing services should validate Host and Origin and use network isolation, while server fetchers block internal ranges after resolution; DNS tests use and clean an isolated zone. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative cases to preserve valid behavior and remove the former interpreter, file, or network-boundary difference.

title.zh: 确认浏览器与服务端 Rebinding 拆分适用边界
title.en: Confirm the Browser and Server-Side Rebinding Split boundary

description.zh: 0-8 行是浏览器 HTML/JavaScript，9-10 行是 DNS 区配置占位，11-12 行才是服务端 URL；执行主体和证据不同。 记录正常输入、执行主体、组件版本和相关进程、文件或网络日志基线。
description.en: Lines 0-8 are browser HTML or JavaScript, 9-10 are DNS-zone placeholders, and 11-12 are server-side URLs, with different execution principals and evidence. Record normal input, the execution principal, component version, and relevant process, file, or network-log baseline.

title.zh: 提交受控浏览器与服务端 Rebinding 拆分样例
title.en: Submit a controlled Browser and Server-Side Rebinding Split case

description.zh: 按索引把 iframe/fetch 路由到 DNS Rebinding Payload，把域名配置迁 DNS 工具卡，把两个通配 URL 路由到 SSRF 绕过卡。 一次只验证一种机制，并以唯一无害标记替代真实敏感读取、系统修改或无边界扫描。
description.en: Route iframe and fetch lines to DNS-rebinding payloads, DNS placeholders to the DNS tool card, and the two wildcard URLs to the SSRF-bypass card. Validate one mechanism at a time and use a unique harmless marker instead of sensitive reads, system changes, or unbounded scanning.

title.zh: 核对浏览器与服务端 Rebinding 拆分证据
title.en: Verify Browser and Server-Side Rebinding Split evidence

description.zh: 浏览器侧需同源和 DevTools/服务日志，DNS 配置需权威解析记录，SSRF 需服务端出站和目标日志；三类证据不可互换。 对齐各层时间戳并排除输入回显、缓存、统一错误、网络抖动和测试工具自身行为。
description.en: Browser cases require origin and browser or service logs, DNS configuration requires authoritative lookup records, and SSRF requires server egress and target logs; evidence is not interchangeable. Align timestamps across layers and exclude reflection, caching, generic errors, network jitter, and behavior caused by the test tool itself.

title.zh: 修复并回归浏览器与服务端 Rebinding 拆分
title.en: Remediate and regress Browser and Server-Side Rebinding Split

description.zh: 浏览器服务校验 Host/Origin 并采用网络隔离，服务端获取器解析后阻断内网；DNS 工具配置使用独立测试域并清理记录。 重放相同三组基线，合法路径应保持可用，异常输入不得再改变执行、文件访问或最终连接目标。
description.en: Browser-facing services should validate Host and Origin and use network isolation, while server fetchers block internal ranges after resolution; DNS tests use and clean an isolated zone. Replay the same three baselines; valid paths should remain functional and anomalous input must no longer alter execution, file access, or final destinations.

review.rationale: 浏览器代码、DNS 配置和服务端 URL 属于三个执行主体，必须按行拆分到 Payload/Tool。
